name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Electoral College vs. National Popular Vote
body:
Citizens are free to say what they think. Subjects aren’t.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=1b94d1761147482689ffbf5662999710&_t=MjdDc6ItGQvDhcj2TQ7W_SIlFW_NwvZ-WYXcO1aJ4UDQpg0MUgqu0id5mvTMQY_1e8ION26CcD7ayup8ZoEwxd8gpx4c3oZkLOERK0u2CzQ-qnthzcXpPoNYDpaK7O4z)_

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b94d1761147482689ffbf5662999710&_e=Ed6PDGnr3p43i4Yx_zrmF1Ecm8XiTg0ka0Mfms2j6NCyXNlpMkk8HkXkHRMJBcw_cvNi3GG-vDFy9JBON-6Q-H_7IB6MOYhqsv50gJPffxYu4EFQscAHmVG6vb_1lGO8LrfIowFI-qLXEfiwxwGtGLNKS-4wPAUNXJR75R94gW_fHJy4-HVndBgRoAA8LYLI8Cc61O-ax3XET9TQr5picshJ7i8V74EIRAVvNIPekyJmD79bTYs3nwUmk8tv0pB41BOpuwFFuXkrgQgJvEobX2qgk9Wieb5vWuURG9NJBPiaxum1JQTeyJ2ro8AJsT3k_hygUQVWd3uF8Im5i3qIGhy2_xTwtrJBvai_YLLpulR5g0P9jNU_1Buig-2HBCGNzh7-y8Al2m0Zzo23BnT3ow%3D%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Citizens are free to say what they think. Subjects aren't.

Sadly, the question of whether we are citizens or subjects has become politically controversial in our country. A clear sign of this is the attempt to suppress the expression of obvious truths, such as the fact that boys cannot become girls.

Another sign that many of our leaders consider us subjects is their denial of our right to decide who is allowed to enter our country--indeed, they tell us that if we complain about mass illegal immigration, we are racists.

**This is a pivotal time in our nation 's history--a time when we must stand up and forthrightly demand to be treated as citizens, not subjects. Because freedom hangs in the balance.**

A poisonous ideology has infected almost every major American institution. Only a few still stand in defense of freedom and the right of self-government.

One of the most important of these is **Hillsdale College**. And today, my friends at Hillsdale need your partnership and support in their mission to preserve the blessings of civil and religious liberty through education.

For 180 years, Hillsdale has offered its students the kind of education America's founders thought necessary to sustain free government. And in recent decades, Hillsdale has extended its teaching mission nationwide with a vast national outreach effort.

This outreach effort includes its free publication _Imprimis_ , its free online courses, and its tireless work to return excellence--including excellent civics instruction--to American K-12 education.

And Hillsdale College does all of this while refusing to accept one penny of government funding--not even indirectly through federal or state student grants and loans.

That's why I ask you to take the time to view their video **"[The Electoral College Explained](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b94d1761147482689ffbf5662999710&_e=Ed6PDGnr3p43i4Yx_zrmF1Ecm8XiTg0ka0Mfms2j6NCyXNlpMkk8HkXkHRMJBcw_cvNi3GG-vDFy9JBON-6Q-H_7IB6MOYhqsv50gJPffxYu4EFQscAHmVG6vb_1lGO8LrfIowFI-qLXEfiwxwGtGLNKS-4wPAUNXJR75R94gW_fHJy4-HVndBgRoAA8LYLI8Cc61O-ax3XET9TQr5picshJ7i8V74EIRAVvNIPekyJmD79bTYs3nwUmk8tv0pB4wrcYEi-4Jx8DD7TR0eCQfIDb5tUGTzAQL7ANl2SUaMuQG2ztuNtg87r8MhNeQlHsHLUB7pjMT9WbskZLrpdUo1ihgduH0ZF_t2DecBKZicKIG2n7O3phIHWD6BEhRlOoUEuKy_MaAzYeuSEWO3AFJA%3D%3D)"** below and join Hillsdale in defending freedom and the American way of life.

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-video](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b94d1761147482689ffbf5662999710&_e=Ed6PDGnr3p43i4Yx_zrmF1Ecm8XiTg0ka0Mfms2j6NCyXNlpMkk8HkXkHRMJBcw_cvNi3GG-vDFy9JBON-6Q-H_7IB6MOYhqsv50gJPffxYu4EFQscAHmVG6vb_1lGO8LrfIowFI-qLXEfiwxwGtGLNKS-4wPAUNXJR75R94gW_fHJy4-HVndBgRoAA8LYLI8Cc61O-ax3XET9TQr5picshJ7i8V74EIRAVvNIPekyJmD79bTYs3nwUmk8tv0pB4DfjYUfDBWlMpcQvBrBiOmQwlXReB2HFzt8ePOdMgntpF5sEtd2jeba3WRbvZyXFbkimIkXk0E9noGxMl2r_SDBJxZ0VgRFisOVIzRYVCSWQjB0yjo0WNYce0kwju0JknGsek6a082EphDaWhK60w_A%3D%3D)**

Sincerely, [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b94d1761147482689ffbf5662999710&_e=Ed6PDGnr3p43i4Yx_zrmF1Ecm8XiTg0ka0Mfms2j6NCyXNlpMkk8HkXkHRMJBcw_cvNi3GG-vDFy9JBON-6Q-H_7IB6MOYhqsv50gJPffxYu4EFQscAHmVG6vb_1lGO8LrfIowFI-qLXEfiwxwGtGLNKS-4wPAUNXJR75R94gW_fHJy4-HVndBgRoAA8LYLI8Cc61O-ax3XET9TQr5picshJ7i8V74EIRAVvNIPekyJmD79bTYs3nwUmk8tv0pB4ajEsCg4AHSLKAa-UC6ofdtHfTR4xeU-23yiyBbWT0Fk6ei0Bt0RGH-2bNQXYEI3zmR5NlfaIKc694Qd2xRvSB2AtYhULrtCCCYXeVpC8pg2rUIiNv8pZlddOwQlpu39vPINprQLMAhMu8y_eOSaypg%3D%3D)
Tucker Carlson
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b94d1761147482689ffbf5662999710&_e=Ed6PDGnr3p43i4Yx_zrmF1Ecm8XiTg0ka0Mfms2j6NCyXNlpMkk8HkXkHRMJBcw_cvNi3GG-vDFy9JBON-6Q-H_7IB6MOYhqsv50gJPffxYu4EFQscAHmVG6vb_1lGO8LrfIowFI-qLXEfiwxwGtGLNKS-4wPAUNXJR75R94gW_fHJy4-HVndBgRoAA8LYLI8Cc61O-ax3XET9TQr5picshJ7i8V74EIRAVvNIPekyJmD79bTYs3nwUmk8tv0pB4r0CcHq0CKZVyA3GXGdEtlMmJxjCc9Uby-qdkWkw8-YG95hyer8PBcq8LxSjlmztzI0hPvRn-qlcZvXOq_2Zaq5y-oVsvZIqfHUTaOiUdyHZTo8J_TrPEOh3ISGc3q7FF1my9Vvf7JyJe24H5lroRdA%3D%3D)

name: Haneefah
subject: Mike Schmuhl - Indiana Democratic Party Chair - Call for Resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah _
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
# Dear Hoosiers,
**Shortly after the presidential election, I was just as disappointed as you were. The DNC Chair Jaime Harrison announced he will not seek renomination, and it is my opinion that neither should our state party leader, Mike Schmuhl.

It will be sad to see Jaime go because he was a hard worker, but respectfully, I have no regrets if Schmuhl leaves us. ** **Like many of you, I am not only disappointed in the election results, but I am also disappointed in our state party leadership.

For far too long, Democrats in Indiana have faced a streak of losses created by people with the same energy as Schmuhl who just aren’t angry enough or calculated enough to make any real changes. ** **Even worse, I'm afraid our party has been infiltrated by fake Democrats, old ones who have lost vision, and new ones who don’t appreciate our long-term vision or goals.

Need examples?

New Democrats like Jennifer McCormick who voted for Trump in the 2016 election and became a Dem for revenge or Mayor Tom McDermott of Hammond who became a Dem because it was convenient for him, should never have been allowed to lead our party ticket! ** **Because of a lack of strong party leadership and accountability, we now have to sit here and watch a racist narcissist (Trump) fall into hole after hole as he implements[Agenda 47](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=0a3f5387f2&e=a49cb82bb3) ****that will never work for the American people!

Banks (Indiana’s newest U.S. Senate-Elect) is nothing but a Trump foot soldier marching to the sound of everything that comes out of Trump’s mouth instead of coming up with his own original plans or ideas. ** **_COME MARCH 2025...NO MORE SMILES, HANDSHAKES AND GRINS! WE MEAN BUSINESS!_** **I’m calling on new, sharp minds across the State of Indiana to consider running for state party leadership now! Share this newsletter with someone you know.

We NEED people that won’t be afraid to start a fire, clap back, and dare this Trump administration to try something in Indiana. I know the talent is here. _Will you join me in the search?_

We need party leaders who demand fair press coverage and do more than just make social media posts! We need party leaders who take action and won't take no for an answer. ** **_DID WE GET WHAT WE DESERVED WITH THE ELECTION RESULTS?_ ** **Schmuhl is a weak leader just like his predecessor!

Plain and simple.

He lacks courage to confront Indiana’s Republican party or hold them accountable for anything they do.

Each year we sit by as they dance around and play in our faces like a bunch of misbehaving children! ** **If you’re like me, you refuse to accept another decade streak of losses like we did with Zody and that means a changing of the guard.

We need someone who can carry this Democratic torch and carry it high!**

_**WE GAVE HIM A CHANCE!**_ **In 2021, soon after Schmuhl’s election, we gave him a solid chance. ** **We all waited anxiously for him to do something. Anything. We gave him money, ideas, constructive criticisms, and ammunition to create a better, more robust party.

We sent him letters, emails, made phone calls, requested meetings, etc. He listened...a little, but ultimately did absolutely nothing. It's just mind-boggling. ** **Schmuhl allowed nonsense to play out again and again and refused to take action when necessary on a number of issues, ranging from allowing great candidates to be knocked off the ballot to not fulfilling his responsibilities to statewide candidates. ** __**Heavy is the head that wears the crown! **__ **Schmuhl knew what a great responsibility he was taking on as a state party leader. He knew it would take constant 24/7 work, but instead, he told himself it wouldn’t take that much, and now here we all are standing at the gates of hell.

Schmuhl hasn't been clear or transparent about any of his work or what he is doing. He doesn't even give us progress reports. **

**If you donate to the Indiana Democratic Party and its candidates like me, then it's okay to respectfully demand results and see where our money is going! ** __**THE RED WAVE**__ **The red wave was preventable, but it happened because our state party didn’t do its part in setting up strong enough communications. ** **One of the biggest mistakes Schmuhl made was being afraid to aggressively make a push for newcomers like Valerie McCray. McCray was the first African American to successfully meet ballot requirements. Schmuhl had the audacity to be preoccupied with old Democrats instead, such as Joe Donnelly. ** **We all respect Joe, but our party needs to focus on new people now!**

**It was unbelievable and embarrassing to watch how this qualified woman (McCray) had to beg for press coverage and seating at the DNC Convention when Banks was the headliner at the RNC Convention! ** _**Schmuhl does not rise to the occasion or respond to the need for a party revival! **_ **Let's be honest. Our state conventions and gatherings are boring. We all fall asleep there. It's Schmuhl's responsibility to keep us engaged and that ain't happened in years!

Aside from being an intern, working at a few news stations, and who he knew giving him a chance to run a now lost and forgotten presidential campaign, _Schmuhl is unqualified for the position he holds._ ** **Mark my words!

If he remains in this role as-is, the only thing we can look forward to is more party deterioration and more losses.

We will keep the same pattern of losing time after time and the same sad email at the end of it all sharing how “well we did” when we know we were trash. ** **One thing we know for sure with Schmuhl: 2024 looked alot like 2022! 2028 will look alot like 2024, and 2030 will be the same as 2028! **

_**Oh, you thought I was finished? I'm just getting started. **_ **_THE BUCK STOPS HERE!_ ** **It’s no secret. The Indiana Republican party has had the Indiana Democratic Party by the balls for decades.

We're giving them the time of their lives! ** **Republicans choose Democratic candidates most likely to be the next bouncy balls in the next general election. Backroom door deals and using Indiana’s outdated signature collection process system is sure to keep strong Democratic candidates out each time. ** **When Republicans see a strong candidate who is a real life threat to their party, they go to great lengths to find weak Dems, such as Jennifer McCormick, Terry Goodin, and the like. ** **Need proof? Both McDermott (2022 U.S. Senate Race) and McCormick (2024 Gubernatorial Race) eagerly filed challenges against long-time fellow Democrats to avoid a primary instead of doing the right thing and running alongside them in the spirit of unity. ** **Each of the candidates they filed challenges against were making history, but they didn’t care. Not surprisingly, they each lost their campaigns. ** _**It isn't rocket science! Such acts that waste our time could've easily been avoided if Schmuhl had properly advised the candidates. **_ **The Indiana Democratic Party is a joke as long as Schmuhl remains in power.

Schmuhl is the reason why Hoosier Democrats think Young (Indiana U.S. Senator) is better than Banks when they are equally as bad! ** **Being more silent or docile (as in this case with Senator Young) doesn’t make you better! Make no mistake about it. Young is silently killing us all behind close doors with his votes and policies just as much as Banks! ** _**Hoosiers, please! Don't you get it? **_ **Young is excited the Trump-backed Banks won his senate race so Indiana Democrats can flock to Young and talk about how grateful we are for him so he can easily win reelection in 2028.

If this party leadership doesn’t change now, you can bet Banks’ election has positioned Young to win again in 2028 because after all, we’re supposed to believe Young is so much better than Banks, right? ** _**TRUMP IS MOVING FAST! WE NEED TO MOVE FASTER! **_ **We've heard it all before. Insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and trusting the same people to do better things for us. **

_**We need someone in position who can keep pace with reality.**_ **Like many of you, I was happy to see a new face when Schmuhl came aboard in 2021, but I was quickly disappointed by a lack of innovation and accountability.

Strangely enough, I felt somewhat supported by Schmuhl in the 2022 senate campaign, but again, I was saddened by his refusal to address internal party problems and conflicts. ** **We all sat and watched him do things we disagreed with. We observed his strange silence. We quietly shook our heads, but never said a word.

But now is the time.

Enough is enough. ** **Mr. Schmuhl, ** **Respectfully, while I appreciate the time we spent together, and I respect you as a person, no one should have to tell you how to do your job. ** **It’s been three years now since you assumed your post. That’s more than enough time to develop a plan of execution and give Hoosier Democrats, Independents, and the Undecided hope. ** **You said you wanted the job. You got it and did nothing with it. ** **It’s my duty, as your fellow Democrat, to hold you accountable.

I present to you an opportunity to get it together now or resign.

It's just that simple. ** **Lead our party with a plan and a voice or step aside and let someone who can. ** **Respectfully Yours, ** **Haneefah Khaaliq, ESQ. ** **Former Indiana U.S. Senate Candidate ** **haneefahkhaaliq.org **
---

Backroom door deals and using Indiana’s outdated signature collection process system is sure to keep strong Democratic candidates out each time. When Republicans see a strong candidate who is a real life threat to their party, they go to great lengths to find weak Dems, such as Jennifer McCormick, Terry Goodin, and the like. Need proof? Both McDermott (2022 U.S. Senate Race) and McCormick (2024 Gubernatorial Race) eagerly filed challenges against long-time fellow Democrats to avoid a primary instead of doing the right thing and running alongside them in the spirit of unity. Each of the candidates they filed challenges against were making history, but they didn’t care. Not surprisingly, they each lost their campaigns. It isn't rocket science! Such acts that waste our time could've easily been avoided if Schmuhl had properly advised the candidates. The Indiana Democratic Party is a joke as long as Schmuhl remains in power. Schmuhl is the reason why Hoosier Democrats think Young (Indiana U.S. Senator) is better than Banks when they are equally as bad! Being more silent or docile (as in this case with Senator Young) doesn’t make you better! Make no mistake about it. Young is silently killing us all behind close doors with his votes and policies just as much as Banks! Hoosiers, please! Don't you get it? Young is excited the Trump-backed Banks won his senate race so Indiana Democrats can flock to Young and talk about how grateful we are for him so he can easily win reelection in 2028. If this party leadership doesn’t change now, you can bet Banks’ election has positioned Young to win again in 2028 because after all, we’re supposed to believe Young is so much better than Banks, right? TRUMP IS MOVING FAST! WE NEED TO MOVE FASTER! We've heard it all before. Insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and trusting the same people to do better things for us. We need someone in position who can keep pace with reality. Like many of you, I was happy to see a new face when Schmuhl came aboard in 2021, but I was quickly disappointed by a lack of innovation and accountability. Strangely enough, I felt somewhat supported by Schmuhl in the 2022 senate campaign, but again, I was saddened by his refusal to address internal party problems and conflicts. We all sat and watched him do things we disagreed with. We observed his strange silence. We quietly shook our heads, but never said a word. But now is the time. Enough is enough. Mr. Schmuhl, Respectfully, while I appreciate the time we spent together, and I respect you as a person, no one should have to tell you how to do your job. It’s been three years now since you assumed your post. That’s more than enough time to develop a plan of execution and give Hoosier Democrats, Independents, and the Undecided hope. You said you wanted the job. You got it and did nothing with it. It’s my duty, as your fellow Democrat, to hold you accountable. I present to you an opportunity to get it together now or resign. It's just that simple. Lead our party with a plan and a voice or step aside and let someone who can. Respectfully Yours, Haneefah Khaaliq, ESQ. Former Indiana U.S. Senate Candidate haneefahkhaaliq.org | | | | Share this newsletter with friends! | | Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information. | | "Find Out More" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com | | Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah To unsubscribe from this list just send a quick email to hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com! You will be removed promptly! | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Hoosiers for Haneefah PO Box 2936 Gary, IN 46403 * USA

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Our race is undecided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Hi Peter,
**Our race for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still undecided.** The stakes feel higher than ever, but we’re still in this.
In 2022, it took a week to determine a winner.
Now, we’re neck-and-neck — but thousands of lawful votes still need to be counted.
**While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes.**
**[To do that, we’ll need your grassroots support. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Lucas Kunce to help us ensure that every lawful vote is counted fairly and securely?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84084?refcode=em20241109-8659&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8659%2E614464%2E05fnKe)**

clean_body: Hi Peter, Our race for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District is still undecided. The stakes feel higher than ever, but we’re still in this. In 2022, it took a week to determine a winner. Now, we’re neck-and-neck — but thousands of lawful votes still need to be counted. While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I am honored to have received so much support over the past two years and I wouldn’t be here without everyone who volunteered, donated, and voted. Thank you so, so much — I am so grateful for your support in our fight for a better Arizona. Onwards! Kirsten Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Bruce Lou
subject: Thank you!!
body:
What an incredible honor it has been running to unseat Nancy Pelosi and fighting to restore common sense policy to San Francisco and the country! | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7d2f9388102f/nancy-pelosis-daughter-preparing-a-run-for-congress-13879527?e=ef288d4667)
---
[](https://bruceforcongress.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5a2a98ac2aba560b5e1ea5b82&id=77bb9441c2&e=ef288d4667)
| | | | |
# Peter,
---
| What an incredible honor it has been running to unseat Nancy Pelosi and fighting to restore common sense policy to San Francisco and the country! Not only did America REJECT Kamala and her radical leftist policies, San Francisco voted to Make Crime Illegal Again, passing Prop 36 with over 65% of voters’ support!!
It’s well known San Francisco is a leftist swamp, but if there’s one thing that my campaign and this election cycle proved, it’s that the needle can be moved.
Throughout this campaign I’ve only been pleasantly surprised by the amount of support and encouragement from voters across the city and the countless Democrats who are FED UP with the status quo and how out of touch Nancy Pelosi is with the people.
Talking to business owners, parents, and people struggling to pay their bills, I’ve engaged with countless voters who not only voted for me, but expressed so much discontent with the Democrat establishment. People are waking up and turning their back on leftist lunacy.
To these disgruntled voters who made the leap in voting for a Republican, to my hardcore conservative supporters, donors, and volunteers—**THANK YOU**!!
Because of you and your investment, we’re moving the needle in San Francisco. Together, we stripped the **HIGHEST** amount of votes from Pelosi in comparison to **ANY** other Republican candidate who’s ever run against her!
We stood by strong with President Trump and put the biggest dent in Pelosi that Republicans have ever achieved.
This cycle has been a tremendous victory for America! Thank you for fighting with me—none of this would have been possible without you!
---
| Yours for Freedom,Bruce Lou [_bruceforcongress.org_](https://bruceforcongress.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5a2a98ac2aba560b5e1ea5b82&id=f5fad0fe76&e=ef288d4667)
---
|

name: Jonathan Nez
subject: Thank You Arizona, Team Nez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Dear Peter,
---
The voters have spoken and I respect the choice of the voters. I just called to congratulate Eli Crane on a hard fought victory to serve a second term and to offer my assistance to help move our district forward.
---
|
---
We are incredibly proud of the campaign we ran and deeply grateful to everyone who joined us on this journey. To all of Team Nez, volunteers, donors, and supporters who poured their hearts into this race — thank you. Your passion and dedication made this campaign possible, and I will be forever inspired by your commitment to building a better future. This campaign led to a historic turnout from tribal nations and rural communities. Although we didn’t get the outcome we hoped for, the work we began together is not over. Our district deserves leaders who will keep fighting for all people, and I promise to continue advocating for the issues that brought us together. We will continue to strive to overcome divisiveness and build a nation rooted in shared values and aspirations.
---
|
---
Thank you again for being part of this historic movement. I am grateful for each and every one of you who believed in and fought for our campaign and for the great people of Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District. I look forward to seeing all that we can achieve together in the future. As we move forward, my family and myself will keep the people of our district, state and country in our prayers. As we wait for the last votes to be counted, I want to thank you for your support. I hope that you look forward to hearing from me and my team in the future as we continue to fight for our rural and tribal communities. Ahéhee' (Thank You), Jonathan Nez
---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z95hqhcqi7i3unu7q1brsnec65qsd02qg5sid2v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j64o71cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdpa3v4gqdo4teivsu95patp0ie5vgltupr4gig_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j64o71cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrs36eijrtfkpvhkhmmb98rkfs74vv40h3rjav8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j64o71cjh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zigsvlme1n2nksi6gg45lk3kk1h23r4drknc9ei8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j64o71cjh2bs)**

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Remaining awake through a great revolution](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151444662&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNDQ0NjYyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEyMTcxMjksImV4cCI6MTczMzgwOTEyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7UVwIew6jN0nwk94Inq_fyPVn54W94E10ZSnDzhBICc)
### My remarks given in Saranac Lake on November 9, 2024
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Nov 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151444662&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNDQ0NjYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTIxNzEyOSwiZXhwIjoxNzMzODA5MTI5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KPN5XKxrmgala1-6_totpBAV1kZMuxcYi2IOuj87haM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151444662&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNDQ0NjYyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEyMTcxMjksImV4cCI6MTczMzgwOTEyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7UVwIew6jN0nwk94Inq_fyPVn54W94E10ZSnDzhBICc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151444662&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNDQ0NjYyLCJpYXQiOjE3MzEyMTcxMjksImV4cCI6MTczMzgwOTEyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7UVwIew6jN0nwk94Inq_fyPVn54W94E10ZSnDzhBICc)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/remaining-awake-through-a-great-revolution?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
Perhaps you saw the following invitation on Facebook: Please join us Saturday, 9th at Riverside Park at 4:30-5:30 in "Carrying the Light Into Darkness". Please bring flashlights or lights to carry. Let's come together and support each other and get strength. Please share.
The organizers of "Carrying the Light Into Darkness" asked me to speak. Something comforting and inspiring. After I said, "Of course, I'd be delighted to speak," I sort of gummed up inside. What in the world would I say?
Usually, I have a broad outline of what I will say, and then I sort of riff on the spot. This time, I wanted to be very careful with my words. This time, I wrote it all out.
Here is what I said:
============================================
I told my team I would be here today, and that I had been asked to speak and to say something that was comforting and inspiring. I asked for suggestions. They said, "Lmao. I guess 'f- 'em they voted for a fascist and that makes them functionally the same as fascists' won't do."
No - that won't do.
Clearly my team needs the week off, which they are taking.
But now, let me see if I can offer some words to comfort and inspire.
But first, THANK YOU. I want to thank those who supported my candidacy. The yard signs. The postcards. The door to door. It is much appreciated. You made a difference.
Let's get some housekeeping out of the way. If you have a yard sign please hang on to it. You need to bring it into your garage or basement, but I have announced my candidacy for 2026, and intentionally I did not put a year on my signs.
You may have heard that my Republican opponent is likely going to be named UN Ambassador. If that happens, she will vacate her seat. Be cautious in your exuberance for Stefanik's appointment, especially if she becomes UN Ambassador. We can expect her to listen to her mentor, the president-elect, and work to defund the UN, pull back on US participation in the UN, and do whatever she can in that position to weaken NATO.
If Stefanik vacates her seat, Governor Kathy Hochul will announce a Special Election. It is then up to the Democratic Party Leaders to select a candidate for the ballot. I am hopeful, but humble, that they will at least consider my candidacy, and we can look for an election some time in Spring of 2025. If the county leaders back away from me it will be because my fundraising was weak compared to those Democrats who ran before me, so I really need to address that weakness. But please - hang on to your signs, stay in contact with my campaign through Substack and through Facebook. And buckle up for a new era in NY21 politics.
Now - here is the message I can offer to you today in an effort to comfort and inspire:
=================================================
Bill Clinton once said: "There's nothing wrong with America that can't be fixed by what's right with America."
As much as we are hurting, I still sincerely believe that.
In the 4 days since the election, I have come to appreciate the value of a single moment.
I can be in the depths of despair, gripped in the paralysis of fear, and charged red-hot in anger in one moment. And in the very next moment, I can be energized, galvanized, and awakened to our primary purpose, which is to resist the rise of fascism within our United States of America.
Cherish those moments. Each and every one. Each side of the coin - the despair and the energy is vital to getting through the shock of this election result.
We have 72 days until the presidential inauguration.
This is like that time on the airplane when they tell you to put the oxygen mask over your own face before stopping to help the person next to you.
Rest. Find your comfort foods or beverages. If you can't eat, or you find yourself eating all the wrong foods, take some food over to a women's shelter, or a homeless shelter. You'll see first hand the healing power of good nutrition.
Limit the doom scrolling - there's a lot of it out there. Watch silly TV. Play music. Dance. Go for a walk.
Recharge. Because we are going to need you soon.
I'm going to remind you that Executive Orders on Immigration were signed within days of the first Trump administration. We will need you.
Soon.
What does that look like? Am I asking you to house an asylum seeker? No - unless you want to. Most likely I'm asking you to be open to showing up at a march or at a protest. Be willing. The right opportunity that speaks to your heart will manifest.
Another famous speaker, the Reverand Doctor Martin Luther King, spoke and wrote of the value of "remaining awake through a great revolution."
And indeed. They will roll out Project 2025. We will launch Resistance 2025. No - that's not a website or a book - yet. But you will find it in groups like Show Up, Adirondack Voters for Change, Indivisible and other groups throughout NY21.
When I taught high school, I worked alongside an organization called Girls, Inc. Right now, if you are female, if you are a member of the LGBT community, if you are a person of color, or an immigrant, I encourage you to do what we taught our students in Girls, Inc: be smart, strong, and bold.
Remember, in New York, we passed Prop 1. And we will protect the rights of all to the greatest extent possible. Those attacks on women - those deprivations of rights - we are not going back.
In the days ahead in this great revolution, we will need you, women, people of color, members of the LGBT community, in particular, to be smart, strong, and bold.
Here are some tips for how you can do that.
First, build your community, such as the friends we have gathered here.
If you don't have a community, find one. They will need you and you will need them after the Inauguration on January 20, 2025.
Listen - to yourself, to your community; listen to the MAGAs. Let Trump voters talk. Find out what they are thinking. It's only by doing that that we can build a bridge and correct our course for the next race. But don't be lulled into their adoration for fascism. Listen, but also be vigilant. Be prepared to counter. Be prepared to walk away. Be prepared to cut ties. Many of us in this crowd had to do that in 2016 in the first Trump presidency. You will survive, no matter how painful. And you will only survive by being true to yourself.
Question everything. If a rule at the local level changes, find out why. At the national level, find out who is advocating for that change in rule or law, and also find out who is heading up the pushback. Find out if that law is bringing us closer to fascism, or reinforcing our democracy.
Take responsibility for your volunteer work. If you commit to showing up for a march or for a postcarding event, make it a priority. We need you.
Run for something. Did you know that none of the Assembly or Senate positions in the North Country had opposing candidates? Even Billy Jones, a Democrat, ran unopposed, as did Dan Stec, a Republican. You don't have to run for a big race. Find positions to run for at the county level, the village level, the town boards. In the county where I live, St. Lawrence County, there are 150 open positions in 2025. Find out what that number is in your county, Franklin, or Essex, and get into action.
Don't drop out. Rest if you must for a day or for a week. But don't be one of those people who says, "The news is all so awful I just can't listen." And if someone you love says, "Oh, I just can't listen to politics", or "I just can't go to that march", remind them that if they drop out now, they will wake up a year from now and wonder how their country changed so much. We moved on. Trump moved on. Everyone will move on, whether they are listening, or marching or tuned out.
Speaking of the news, choose your news sources carefully. There is a rising tide of online sources that is set apart from the mainstream media. And that's all across the political spectrum.
As the Democrats and progressives parse through the results of this election, remember that we have a big tent in our big blue party. Kamala Harris frequently says, "We have so many more things that unite us than divide us." So if one person says we lost the election because we did not reach out to people of color, and another person says we lost the election because we did not adequately address the issues in the economy, avoid pitching your own tent to make one side right and the other side wrong.
Big Tent. We must be united as we embark on this journey of resistance.
I didn't talk about it much during my campaign, but my daughter and I survived domestic violence years ago. When she was around 5 years old, we spent about a month in a shelter for women and children because it was not safe for us to be in our own home, nor was it safe for us to stay among friends. We went to a shelter for immigrants from Central America. As I settled in for that first night in a shelter where -- by the way, I had worked as a volunteer activist and then was a guest in need of help -- a small, still voice inside me said "Everything I really need I already have."
I don't know where that thought came from. Divine inspiration, perhaps. "Everything I really need I already have."
And so I stand before you today to share that thought with you as we move forward into this resistance movement.
Everything you really need, you already have.
Be smart. Be strong. Be bold.
Find the ways that we can fix the things that are wrong with America with the things that are right with America.
And remember to remain awake through our new great revolution.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

clean_body: My remarks given in Saranac Lake on November 9, 2024 | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race * My remarks given in Saranac Lake on November 9, 2024 | | | Nov 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | Perhaps you saw the following invitation on Facebook: Please join us Saturday, 9th at Riverside Park at 4:30-5:30 in "Carrying the Light Into Darkness". Please bring flashlights or lights to carry. Let's come together and support each other and get strength. Please share. The organizers of "Carrying the Light Into Darkness" asked me to speak. Something comforting and inspiring. After I said, "Of course, I'd be delighted to speak," I sort of gummed up inside. What in the world would I say? Usually, I have a broad outline of what I will say, and then I sort of riff on the spot. This time, I wanted to be very careful with my words. This time, I wrote it all out. Here is what I said: ============================================ I told my team I would be here today, and that I had been asked to speak and to say something that was comforting and inspiring. I asked for suggestions. They said, "Lmao. I guess 'f- 'em they voted for a fascist and that makes them functionally the same as fascists' won't do." No - that won't do. Clearly my team needs the week off, which they are taking. But now, let me see if I can offer some words to comfort and inspire. But first, THANK YOU. I want to thank those who supported my candidacy. The yard signs. The postcards. The door to door. It is much appreciated. You made a difference. Let's get some housekeeping out of the way. If you have a yard sign please hang on to it. You need to bring it into your garage or basement, but I have announced my candidacy for 2026, and intentionally I did not put a year on my signs. You may have heard that my Republican opponent is likely going to be named UN Ambassador. If that happens, she will vacate her seat. Be cautious in your exuberance for Stefanik's appointment, especially if she becomes UN Ambassador. We can expect her to listen to her mentor, the president-elect, and work to defund the UN, pull back on US participation in the UN, and do whatever she can in that position to weaken NATO. If Stefanik vacates her seat, Governor Kathy Hochul will announce a Special Election. It is then up to the Democratic Party Leaders to select a candidate for the ballot. I am hopeful, but humble, that they will at least consider my candidacy, and we can look for an election some time in Spring of 2025. If the county leaders back away from me it will be because my fundraising was weak compared to those Democrats who ran before me, so I really need to address that weakness. But please - hang on to your signs, stay in contact with my campaign through Substack and through Facebook. And buckle up for a new era in NY21 politics. Now - here is the message I can offer to you today in an effort to comfort and inspire: ================================================= Bill Clinton once said: "There's nothing wrong with America that can't be fixed by what's right with America." As much as we are hurting, I still sincerely believe that. In the 4 days since the election, I have come to appreciate the value of a single moment. I can be in the depths of despair, gripped in the paralysis of fear, and charged red-hot in anger in one moment. And in the very next moment, I can be energized, galvanized, and awakened to our primary purpose, which is to resist the rise of fascism within our United States of America. Cherish those moments. Each and every one. Each side of the coin - the despair and the energy is vital to getting through the shock of this election result. We have 72 days until the presidential inauguration. This is like that time on the airplane when they tell you to put the oxygen mask over your own face before stopping to help the person next to you. Rest. Find your comfort foods or beverages. If you can't eat, or you find yourself eating all the wrong foods, take some food over to a women's shelter, or a homeless shelter. You'll see first hand the healing power of good nutrition. Limit the doom scrolling - there's a lot of it out there. Watch silly TV. Play music. Dance. Go for a walk. Recharge. Because we are going to need you soon. I'm going to remind you that Executive Orders on Immigration were signed within days of the first Trump administration. We will need you. Soon. What does that look like? Am I asking you to house an asylum seeker? No - unless you want to. Most likely I'm asking you to be open to showing up at a march or at a protest. Be willing. The right opportunity that speaks to your heart will manifest. Another famous speaker, the Reverand Doctor Martin Luther King, spoke and wrote of the value of "remaining awake through a great revolution." And indeed. They will roll out Project 2025. We will launch Resistance 2025. No - that's not a website or a book - yet. But you will find it in groups like Show Up, Adirondack Voters for Change, Indivisible and other groups throughout NY21. When I taught high school, I worked alongside an organization called Girls, Inc. Right now, if you are female, if you are a member of the LGBT community, if you are a person of color, or an immigrant, I encourage you to do what we taught our students in Girls, Inc: be smart, strong, and bold. Remember, in New York, we passed Prop 1. And we will protect the rights of all to the greatest extent possible. Those attacks on women - those deprivations of rights - we are not going back. In the days ahead in this great revolution, we will need you, women, people of color, members of the LGBT community, in particular, to be smart, strong, and bold. Here are some tips for how you can do that. First, build your community, such as the friends we have gathered here. If you don't have a community, find one. They will need you and you will need them after the Inauguration on January 20, 2025. Listen - to yourself, to your community; listen to the MAGAs. Let Trump voters talk. Find out what they are thinking. It's only by doing that that we can build a bridge and correct our course for the next race. But don't be lulled into their adoration for fascism. Listen, but also be vigilant. Be prepared to counter. Be prepared to walk away. Be prepared to cut ties. Many of us in this crowd had to do that in 2016 in the first Trump presidency. You will survive, no matter how painful. And you will only survive by being true to yourself. Question everything. If a rule at the local level changes, find out why. At the national level, find out who is advocating for that change in rule or law, and also find out who is heading up the pushback. Find out if that law is bringing us closer to fascism, or reinforcing our democracy. Take responsibility for your volunteer work. If you commit to showing up for a march or for a postcarding event, make it a priority. We need you. Run for something. Did you know that none of the Assembly or Senate positions in the North Country had opposing candidates? Even Billy Jones, a Democrat, ran unopposed, as did Dan Stec, a Republican. You don't have to run for a big race. Find positions to run for at the county level, the village level, the town boards. In the county where I live, St. Lawrence County, there are 150 open positions in 2025. Find out what that number is in your county, Franklin, or Essex, and get into action. Don't drop out. Rest if you must for a day or for a week. But don't be one of those people who says, "The news is all so awful I just can't listen." And if someone you love says, "Oh, I just can't listen to politics", or "I just can't go to that march", remind them that if they drop out now, they will wake up a year from now and wonder how their country changed so much. We moved on. Trump moved on. Everyone will move on, whether they are listening, or marching or tuned out. Speaking of the news, choose your news sources carefully. There is a rising tide of online sources that is set apart from the mainstream media. And that's all across the political spectrum. As the Democrats and progressives parse through the results of this election, remember that we have a big tent in our big blue party. Kamala Harris frequently says, "We have so many more things that unite us than divide us." So if one person says we lost the election because we did not reach out to people of color, and another person says we lost the election because we did not adequately address the issues in the economy, avoid pitching your own tent to make one side right and the other side wrong. Big Tent. We must be united as we embark on this journey of resistance. I didn't talk about it much during my campaign, but my daughter and I survived domestic violence years ago. When she was around 5 years old, we spent about a month in a shelter for women and children because it was not safe for us to be in our own home, nor was it safe for us to stay among friends. We went to a shelter for immigrants from Central America. As I settled in for that first night in a shelter where -- by the way, I had worked as a volunteer activist and then was a guest in need of help -- a small, still voice inside me said "Everything I really need I already have." I don't know where that thought came from. Divine inspiration, perhaps. "Everything I really need I already have." And so I stand before you today to share that thought with you as we move forward into this resistance movement. Everything you really need, you already have. Be smart. Be strong. Be bold. Find the ways that we can fix the things that are wrong with America with the things that are right with America. And remember to remain awake through our new great revolution. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. TheFederalistWire.com

Fellow American,

Speaker Johnson is ready to help President Trump implement the
most sweeping America First agenda this nation has ever seen.

From cutting taxes, to securing our border, to unleashing a new
era of energy dominance, nothing is off the table.

But the Biden-Harris administration left us a HUGE mess to
clean up and we need to get started on DAY ONE!

We need to know, Fellow American, what do you think Speaker Johnson and
President Trump should work to tackle first?

ANSWER NOW

Your opinion will go a long way toward assuring that we are
truly representing the will of the people.

Can we count on you to respond?

Sincerely,

Team Johnson

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're putting together a BEAUTIFUL thank you note for President Trump - will you sign it?

|
---
| | | Friend,

On November 5th, the American people rose up and provided President Trump with the mandate to save our country.

House Republicans are incredibly grateful for President Trump so we're putting together a thank you note!

_**[Will you join us and add your name to the thank you note today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg984eb6epib3693taham9j0q5sgbjsesq1eukng_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j66ob5cjh2bs "Will you join us and add your name to the thank you note today?")**_

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5po3stjto1no6ovv61m12gdr24v702piievgaug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j61oj2c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbgh2mtvkdsnis7rasnljl95aga3ts78aodi4q80_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j61oj2c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj4h8e6vhntl20qqj773h6plpmgm773i02bnno0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j61oj2c3h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvbmed531grcocjcu7ebo0ftdrvqdbr168p69ig0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9j61oj2c3h2bs)**
---

body:
We need to secure every possible vote

|

| | | _Friend, there are**still seats in California that are too close to call!**_

_**Desperate Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are going to do everything they can to take down Republicans.**_

_**[We are sending armies of staffers to California to make sure that every legal vote is counted, and we need your help to continue funding our operation.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd075rmu9vs6dde93jlfpjkq9utn6ju0t6motcq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9gm8o70cth2bs "We are sending armies of staffers to California to make sure that every legal vote is counted, and we need your help to continue funding our operation.")**_

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: The Founders' Almanac
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vslHNHZWYN
Most Americans know very little about America's founding.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslHNHZWYN

Fellow
Conservative,

Most
Americans know very little about America's founding.

In
today's public schools, instead of learning about our Founding
Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are
brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The
Heritage Foundation, we're dedicated to creating conservative
policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But
if our country is to survive, the American people must know our
founding principles and the history that brought it about.

That's
why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to
teaching the public about American history and our Founding
Fathers.

We
published our Founders' Almanac for this exact purpose.

This
informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding
Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams
along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the
Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and
Washington's Farewell Address.

To help
further your knowledge of American history, I'd like to offer you
a free digital copy of Heritage's Founders' Almanac.

You can
download your free copy using the secure link below.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63776321:slHNHZWYN:m:3:2532013465:8A480C52EC4985A96F48230A3C817AB2:r

Please
use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and
stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D.
Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

body:
We need to secure every possible vote

|

| | | _Friend, there are**still seats in California that are too close to call!**_

_**[We are sending armies of staffers to California to make sure that every legal vote is counted, and we need your help to continue funding our operation.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl34eepf11gjt6v509872kujunsfbivek1agpkkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c9gmcor2cdh2bs "We are sending armies of staffers to California to make sure that every legal vote is counted, and we need your help to continue funding our operation.")**_

name: John McGuire For Congress
subject: Veterans Day, A Story of Redemption
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia

| | | | [View as Webpage](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TJHN4crEzKteJXN5w63LDxp7cqSvDwYX_OIyWSw_vfgWeg1sVpa2mP142GaJtf26Ld_w_kCuoLVH-s2xaV_o4gIea768kyW_UqVpT-MqpI5se-jjwUJYW6r9xkRCUkdO9XYvmf5WLYIGO9V4rhHOTQ==&c=Q4Rmm-Za8lsph2MHn0rG8jiBS1jsl7eIHcyl8H9RIDYBWT9UHt-aRA==&ch=D_Y9XmVLPpAcdQBWFIDiDgRzaWYjTWzHT3xCXYzmPutrjtdLoROM7g==)

---
| Veterans Day, A Story of Redemption
---
---
Friends,
I am thankful we have a God of second chances. No one is perfect. We all fall down or make mistakes. When you fall down, always get back up. So long as you always get back up you are still in the fight!
Sometimes God gives us obstacles and challenges in our lives to show us they can be moved and to chisel us into the men and women we are supposed to be.
I'd like to share the following story about this incredible week for our family and my father in particular, a story of redemption.
Due to addiction to alcohol and other challenges, my sister and I were abandoned by our mom when I was 5, we spent time in foster homes, and I attended 9 different elementary schools. My brother and my two other sisters experienced their own challenges. The negative impact of addiction I witnessed as a child is obviously the top reason, at age 56, why I've never tasted alcohol or tried cigarettes. In the military, I made a great designated driver and my teammates will never forget me getting them home safe.
Through the grace of God, my Grandfather, a Navy veteran who fought in WW2, and my grandmother rescued my sister and I and raised us until my father got sober. For the love of his children, somehow my father, an Army veteran, found the strength to stop drinking alcohol and he stopped smoking cigarettes. That difficult past must have weighed heavily on my father and I'm sure he was full of regret.
But this week my father age 83 experienced a lot of redemption. This week our father celebrated 41 years of being sober, his youngest son my brother and Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney Rusty McGuire was promoted to Brigadier General in the Virginia National Guard and me, his oldest son, won my race to represent the Virginia 5th Congressional District in the House of Representatives.
Once he got sober we saw on many occasions our father literally give his shirt of off his back to help others at a moments notice. This effort to help others gave us our sense of service which led to our military service. Our success would not have been possible if our father hadn't fought so hard to get sober. You could see his face light up when my brother was promoted to Brigadier General.
Our father and so many veterans know that freedom must be handed down to inspire the next generation to serve. So, on Veterans Day let's thank veterans for their service in the military and know their service continues after the military at home with their family and in the community.
I hope you and your family enjoy Veterans Day. Please thank someone in your life who served, developed your sense of service, and inspired you to greatness.
---
| For God and Country,
---
---
State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria
Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL [Business Owner](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TJHN4crEzKteJXN5w63LDxp7cqSvDwYX_OIyWSw_vfgWeg1sVpa2mN2olJBGUyxr5fX4XS2Fi-zrsw6ie9uUU8LAGiO3pFjbhR92mbYRkqCaBxuVeb_ybqJ51LzTgehTHBCJmuYsn9Ace10f6ZN0qQ==&c=Q4Rmm-Za8lsph2MHn0rG8jiBS1jsl7eIHcyl8H9RIDYBWT9UHt-aRA==&ch=D_Y9XmVLPpAcdQBWFIDiDgRzaWYjTWzHT3xCXYzmPutrjtdLoROM7g==)

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cffc0801ad9d49d48276010e59de5244&_e=KJYxofaJgt3xUrcfPGschTH-myyqGnJds_F12sstLMV3lZiPPWmUKFScsFhbZaYz4gclYeL77LMtz7uMFH2wpR8vHR8VnIe3TzkcbJtF-_XTUxChoW6z-6wkPPaOgbZGgRwUr_Ov2JayDQta6sCNxmMR8fXD8htOSOBT1agA_gPVqCVu7gXcWQGJxGTLlSyLLiR3yZ1EvQjAzf8ZwxdjOiXMyEQxGTsykZQIY4izbCzmzoOTRzxbHMkJlXy8dZn_hBQ4ZRUqZJHvIhliheRiA-f5OaFQVRUDtvO1h15YTxgDFeiCZoW3LpbEllQDlbivKpae5NsWqJ1NBpezfTDpCJ8FuqOomgLuePRZ7WwMKfhbaFQfkN-WcwP2jW_hvu2lkEM5lBIwEvV1zwzaoTjHKJe8giWwyrWkHz1YHMwkDJUm_nA9FmsvWpGqpIpWTc-9) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called " The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The " The Second World Wars" DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dfJ7VOz22RciwVDB0_a9IA~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dfJ7VOz22RciwVDB0_a9IA~~/AARclAA~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dfJ7VOz22RciwVDB0_a9IA~~/AARclAA~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dfJ7VOz22RciwVDB0_a9IA~~/AARclAA~)**
---

Conservative Broadcast

body:
There are no kings that rule the United States of America.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a153fe4-e8fd-4cd0-9974-38ddc4a4e0f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb278a3bb-7723-4f4a-b992-416240030df4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter – President Biden and Senator Schumer are working around the clock to pass an important bill before Trump takes office in January. If it passes, Donald Trump’s immunity would be erased and the far-right Supreme Court’s power would instantly be limited! CAN YOU BELIEVE IT?! But we need EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT who reads this to endorse this bill before midnight >> _**[[ ADD YOUR NAME → ]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T701a6102-fc94-4a32-8d33-26451f3bbd94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_

|

| | | Here are three quick reasons why this bill is so important: 1) Trump would be held accountable for his many crimes – including the 34 felony convictions on his record. 2) The Supreme Court, controlled by a 6-3 conservative majority, would stop any corruption that they’ve been a part of! 3) Trump would not be in office EVER AGAIN. Don’t believe us? Just take a look: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta98c9f4a-9aa2-430c-90b5-ba3ddc04538d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | This is a democracy, Peter. There are no kings that rule the United States of America. And we need to keep it that way. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3dc22a7-3a6f-4cc9-8970-be6404c31cde/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Friend, thank you SO much for your unwavering support. YOU are the reason that Republicans took back the U.S. Senate.

We know you're extremely busy, so we won't be long.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17ba53ceb2934ff1bc68b6eeaceeb077&_e=9WTEjkKiN-lvEjnwuXi5f_wdZz9uaSuAI3f9vDpLY_Thx6ugnrRSJEA1GAbMk4V7BPtdZa-nRIAveUjZSPQKEMfTy9RqKj82vP9p29SREnElNF_QC-BE5w5IbwnBritJIx7MJY2w-klQn7cN9fH5bsGecVQHGQE7w0UtJCXn0M7INxnMwIiNNOMkhtUn0DSJpsanhd4lB-uw2LVYgCMeNpOoVgZt2Y62DJrnlO9WqrqwOlFJCDNiVLDhXmpP72KsAn1O89r948QwIVcMllnuwfOPndFwxt14D8awah1fI9LseqG2tmAq19MPY-DfmMslclpvlzUlfJPdOzgi7FL9AnjyYnnduZag8HKElX4KIgej4KeaEAJvohHhw0Gia46iSXyT0cwtUZg0xzLFci88pUiFdwNxGCAouwSKAJl2QdX-9xKMZLjbLIlomczw5tks) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17ba53ceb2934ff1bc68b6eeaceeb077&_e=9WTEjkKiN-lvEjnwuXi5f_wdZz9uaSuAI3f9vDpLY_Thx6ugnrRSJEA1GAbMk4V7BPtdZa-nRIAveUjZSPQKEMfTy9RqKj82vP9p29SREnElNF_QC-BE5w5IbwnBritJIx7MJY2w-klQn7cN9fH5bsGecVQHGQE7w0UtJCXn0M7INxnMwIiNNOMkhtUn0DSJpsanhd4lB-uw2LVYgCMeNpOoVgZt2Y62DJrnlO9WqrqwOlFJCDNiVLDhXmpP72KsAn1O89r948QwIVcMllnuwTdokK7NfsgaoCSiUG7YKS7Yu3LW_jI98Qm2525Yyc95Cjosf6lhH4v77BZES45EAZsakoeAYMeH9p--2vy-dbI4lh1BVdhABeSw_0RF_VFuUvhTQ_3VFaZPT9X4Ofw_pCcnnE948Nkpcnt9VTbFsaCzU9BYqvwhBv8ctZVerBn7) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17ba53ceb2934ff1bc68b6eeaceeb077&_e=9WTEjkKiN-lvEjnwuXi5f_wdZz9uaSuAI3f9vDpLY_Thx6ugnrRSJEA1GAbMk4V7BPtdZa-nRIAveUjZSPQKEMfTy9RqKj82vP9p29SREnElNF_QC-BE5w5IbwnBritJIx7MJY2w-klQn7cN9fH5bsGecVQHGQE7w0UtJCXn0M7INxnMwIiNNOMkhtUn0DSJpsanhd4lB-uw2LVYgCMeNpOoVgZt2Y62DJrnlO9WqrqwOlFJCDNiVLDhXmpP72KsAn1O89r948QwIVcMllnuwZYzpsWjlukuMToZr6M-pSZljYGQdaVevMtdpYpsUFck4zKFPiVX8MkOfWYj2zCNp1IF5CMBMbeJMcw2gzHk1a4getshRnb_LHPiyN8F1K3e_pMnqYYFHPdcnq9KP9RW0kB6RlngwIJKH0O2KrSy5dId38Ic1HFiCIoc2SniqIBi)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17ba53ceb2934ff1bc68b6eeaceeb077&_e=9WTEjkKiN-lvEjnwuXi5f_wdZz9uaSuAI3f9vDpLY_Thx6ugnrRSJEA1GAbMk4V7BPtdZa-nRIAveUjZSPQKEMfTy9RqKj82vP9p29SREnElNF_QC-BE5w5IbwnBritJIx7MJY2w-klQn7cN9fH5bsGecVQHGQE7w0UtJCXn0M7INxnMwIiNNOMkhtUn0DSJpsanhd4lB-uw2LVYgCMeNpOoVgZt2Y62DJrnlO9WqrqwOlFJCDNiVLDhXmpP72KsAn1O89r948QwIVcMllnuwSesvkLz_0zd0kJMpFQU2SZ06nyjA4FnI1KjbKYUbaS3ke_CQfGW62O0UDbSAxByS3bj7Ul2WV-NC6bIGYChxga0DpSu9GyyWAjxgj30Zct2jXipqjOsJkiYeW4sqS1MwyaqJrtbp_f2A82XjU0JfK5QQl79oNMLinqnV2bH8eR3)**

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0441f60039974f5a8ea5a925ced00457&_e=432F28NEI4I2pg4Pi6WwOgKkiU9RscMD7po3Gls6E2ITUkLjofYCwL13ibacpIQC2rqoWYw4KWRUk1Q8oOcWegwcrZZfwdLdJ-v8i4JGVeQo_EkmLkMCReuElPHukM5ifMMX3s74rJYYVoZHu5vM5s80c4MEU91T0zaE06BNZfZ_1qfTIBHDQ6sM2TKW-Sf5gdyerHbBaX85gMjkXj6ZXrkYeDAJuZRT17eALvRvt7d-ohZCK1mLyJ1kZauxqkQbcMKFDFinAmg1DULbDzFdqvu9-hT5qrcAEC3xAe0YWn2yA1cqQ6qvynzdwARsm-d9FXqlRBi1tkkhtRC1Wsm3S8AnMQoofWiq6pn7beE9EHDHZZigjBdVVVvSHb6jzTtFn7m63ZdVSzO3eOb4qwMjBHXb3goIaCIm5aTpuY1BV-9wG4PHeAThooAX4bUiix5l) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0441f60039974f5a8ea5a925ced00457&_e=432F28NEI4I2pg4Pi6WwOgKkiU9RscMD7po3Gls6E2ITUkLjofYCwL13ibacpIQC2rqoWYw4KWRUk1Q8oOcWegwcrZZfwdLdJ-v8i4JGVeQo_EkmLkMCReuElPHukM5ifMMX3s74rJYYVoZHu5vM5s80c4MEU91T0zaE06BNZfZ_1qfTIBHDQ6sM2TKW-Sf5gdyerHbBaX85gMjkXj6ZXrkYeDAJuZRT17eALvRvt7d-ohZCK1mLyJ1kZauxqkQbcMKFDFinAmg1DULbDzFdquOROZ2m5D4eSY5CfsuBuextZuYcj9jpr0jkFnocWuDIQgB0eRlt_Yypeze-I6jTc_TFU_jItfwAAaxUFhpFxqedTQH3wg-02_Dq9eKRhXV6iQGb-Mda_e7qNra6TfmMqDtKlB821MrdE8gFltedF8Wh0lHnfNkqpAxDUJmqqsLZ) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0441f60039974f5a8ea5a925ced00457&_e=432F28NEI4I2pg4Pi6WwOgKkiU9RscMD7po3Gls6E2ITUkLjofYCwL13ibacpIQC2rqoWYw4KWRUk1Q8oOcWegwcrZZfwdLdJ-v8i4JGVeQo_EkmLkMCReuElPHukM5ifMMX3s74rJYYVoZHu5vM5s80c4MEU91T0zaE06BNZfZ_1qfTIBHDQ6sM2TKW-Sf5gdyerHbBaX85gMjkXj6ZXrkYeDAJuZRT17eALvRvt7d-ohZCK1mLyJ1kZauxqkQbcMKFDFinAmg1DULbDzFdqmFuNMxIss4EUgb9v9DLUbCIFt1RcPq32uNC1dVm3aPmFKUAIDIoT3dyDZLtGNR28MJSHt2fmsg1l0yaBFdPvPHIfoWTzeurm2pxgLWXcHDwvFsabI_IGhaU59cM6jG0M74cDse0G7jxfxCGuhE5SGLxFd8Ypw8uO-VroBKpr26i)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0441f60039974f5a8ea5a925ced00457&_e=432F28NEI4I2pg4Pi6WwOgKkiU9RscMD7po3Gls6E2ITUkLjofYCwL13ibacpIQC2rqoWYw4KWRUk1Q8oOcWegwcrZZfwdLdJ-v8i4JGVeQo_EkmLkMCReuElPHukM5ifMMX3s74rJYYVoZHu5vM5s80c4MEU91T0zaE06BNZfZ_1qfTIBHDQ6sM2TKW-Sf5gdyerHbBaX85gMjkXj6ZXrkYeDAJuZRT17eALvRvt7d-ohZCK1mLyJ1kZauxqkQbcMKFDFinAmg1DULbDzFdqsEwt6Epw6iwC1AOfq5Jau9eqDhYWpwCUZZh65-0z1bYT1-if4ctTGBQ-wYjFXdmA-Lbg6SnEkL9zOjp0HdBh0M18hHwZLwQ70_GBHy55SKaDteoI3Y0wXuyM7ZMhRmRy47VrCk_vvigAWwhbXg_jPNEm7hoJbxPGO8YyRZNnjn2)**

# SUNDAY, November 10, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1975, the freighter S.S. Edmund Fitzgerald sank in Lake Superior during a massive storm, killing all 29 of the crew. The singer Gordon Lightfoot memorialized the tragedy in [a hit song the following year.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnsbcgn88QM3iIVGVLh7ZqR3Q2R3Bk4og4IN6-onvX75N-0v_n0l0opni_vtPErgy500qbA8ABVNdTTFtnZO8GZs0o2cERQaPF2srReYu-Cf7Y9kRcBwJWNqBiVnVrfGNkdLsGAAoANZrKkOV6oCa0hth6EkZxH0ueq1uO9zLykLa88FyFPMnkxlIeT4Enoc9Cn9d1rbb8Ki_P-78vVMIo8LwIfGuXz69m_P646ZOcXf9YY0rx2RyFUdeJYvojy3-Ji9O_AQAA___JLFLk) Speaking of light feet, today's video shows mascots running full speed while playing football against some fully-padded kids. We hope you [enjoy it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvszAQxvFPY7Yg3_kgZPAQvZE33qFLu6ErPsCNCRFYcdJPX9G9-0_Po_9727UcYriN_3kWm4alQ410ADiA7jyH-Oqo8HYQQTGFWDgaQNOYqikmS-ZEPfSD18QVosZKn3TdANWV11BhEey-BgAawKChkriRauC6PxFL88mKtPiQlrX8WsItTTLE1_KQteyXuYh2Sum-KXNW6BS6nHMZblviceV5FwrdKhIVusv5TR-vh3b8l3drXBi3SZmLn59X_9F_M7pni5SL1fp7DjGGrT4q0uPMIf6epb_iHxZ_AgAA__8kWFlz) as much as we did!
