When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! A recap of Project 2025 and how to counter its fascist policies | | | Nov 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | This article's headline is not clickbait, it is the sad reality, and we need to be ready. I read the 900+ page Project 2025 fascist manifesto so you don't have to. And over the coming weeks I will provide resources to navigate that fascist plan, with action items on how to fight back. Indeed, MAGA Republicans have made no secret of their intent to enforce Project 2025, and we must remain informed. Let 's Address This. I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. Subscribe below & join the movement. | | ---|---|--- A supporter holds a Project 2025 fan in the group's tent at the Iowa State Fair on Aug. 14, 2023. (Photo cred: Charlie Neibergall / Associated Press) I have already published these detailed pieces on Project 2025. In fact, most of these were published before Biden stepped down. Below, I share the link to the full article, as well as an excerpt I wrote from each of those articles to summarize its main points. With Project 2025, we are beyond mere arrival of fascism in America--we are on the cusp of full blown fascism. Project 2025 seeks to fully transform the United States into a banana republic and theocracy--both concepts repugnant to a U.S. Constitution committed to secular governance and equal access under the law. And given the success these right wing extremists have had in taking over the United States Supreme Court and hundreds of members of the United States Congress, it would be unwise to dismiss them as unserious in their attempts to win back the White House. Project 2025 disregards life, common sense, and science, and views essentially all abortion and reproductive access as evil. Based on what it defines as "biblical values ," Project 2025 ultimately seeks to ban abortion altogether through defunding access, criminalizing access, and denying young people basic education and knowledge of how their own bodies work. It is dead set on transforming our secular government into a theocratic Christian nationalist fascist state. One in which women do not have the fundamental human right of personal autonomy, nor do physicians have the common sense ability to practice medical science according to actual science, not evangelical theocracy. Project 2025 views DEI as the source of all ills in America. It is dead set on returning our government and business hiring practices to the Jim Crow era, a time when Black people, Asians, Latinos, and women had no meaningful opportunity for an equal shot at admission, a job, a loan, or a promotion. A Project 2025 administration will absolutely further normalize discrimination against people of color and women, not to mention LGBTQ+ Americans. And Project 2025 absolutely will fine, punish, and arguably imprison for alleged racial discrimination anyone who even mentions the concepts of DEI. It is imperative, therefore, that we do not allow this fascist manifesto to become American policy. Project 2025 fears a public education system that calls for meaningful racial justice and accountability, one that holds a mirror up to the injustices of white supremacy, and one that demands equal access to education for children of all races and socio-economic classes. It not only bans teaching about DEI, it demands prosecution of universities and employers who enact DEI practices. Throughout the manifesto, Project 2025 calls for a ban on any instruction that teaches about race or racism in the United States. In short, an education system under a Project 2025 administration would mean a gutting of public education, a transfer o wealth to predominantly white, predominately wealthy families for private school vouchers, an advancement of Christian nationalist theocratic education, a ban on teachings of racial justice, a green light for even violent anti-LGBTQ discrimination, and an exacerbation of existing racial segregation and underfunding of majority Black and Latino institutions. What Should We Be Doing Right Now? With the election behind us, we must activate, organize, and invest if we hope to enact meaningful change for justice in the next election. Let's break down what that looks like with specific action items. Activate: Get involved in your local politics. Whether it is your local Democratic committee, your local school board, or your local city council, get involved. Show up to the next meeting, meet your local elected officials, and understand the local issues impacting your community. Google is your friend in finding a local calendar of events. Use it. All politics is local, and it is critical you get involved locally. Organize: Next, bring friends with you. You are the best ambassador for justice in your friend group--lead by example. Grab even one friend and drag them with you to the next school board meeting, city council session, or town hall in your local community. We need to build organizational capacity, and means each one reaches one to get involved. (And when your friend comes to the second meeting, it is their opportunity to reach one more and bring them with). Invest: Finally, invest your time and your money into the people and organizations doing the front line work. If you have time to volunteer, make phone calls, knock doors, and sign petitions (e.g. ), do so. If you have the financial resources to donate to candidates committed to justice, donate to organizations working to protect our democracy, or to support writers and human rights lawyers working to stop fascism in America (e.g. ), do so. We may not have the billions of dollars in dark money from corporate autocrats, but we have strength in numbers and every individual donation has a lasting impact. These are three small but effective steps to begin to right our ship. By meaningfully activating, organizing, and investing, we give ourselves the real opportunity of enacting transformational change in our politics. It will not happen over night, but what seems impossible today will appear inevitable tomorrow. Stay tuned for more updates on Project 2025 and calls to action to fight back. As for me, I will be doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I cannot do it alone. I invite you to support my work and advocacy by subscribing below. Thank you for your trust and partnership. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard.

It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves.
My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work.
**[_So please, split $20 or more between NV Dems and myself today to ensure we have what it takes to keep this operation running._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTQc2-V32c2KydZck1fb2jAxRLV-AryU9rJJvQoUbZ-RqX-J7rEAI8PO3Ig_sNpnhBWA5DA9ecZbRqNALRtTiPVLFu7dPGMrORYbpa2GKJqz3ZgrSvgBjBMQkT-zDOh5AQwnkH83RKJ4OsInJAaarf8PZwfflpWICEjM4c5sGdKHMqOP6ckkZZbT9_9oBOO_dBKqPEAnGo9DRZ39ypHDETof478HmGawp06fJBYOq82SB9OStubPNPifd9amf8bTr6tOY0cKHcCAa0P9W4uj4lnqSVxV_N11-RfVpaAzE0Wb2I7uaQlwjHY4huAf7SV7nNVH8aNIvYy_WgFvACihbTJ0dZ6ck6DG9AKqoSV42T8_wwk0R7tUPi35zAuEBivyL2jwZDXN5cYYFhxn5bXOYhRnIEeOcLAU1t3UCjmvbZHJ0/4bc/s7P21TT0SoOwKhjDU5fFVA/h1/h001.ZfdIYECvLnatG0QudQBhbWp5nW3Xo8SI--RHZSTCp9A)**

clean_body: | | | | Hello friend, This Senate race is still too close to call, and my team needs your help to ensure every Pennsylvanian has their voice heard. It has been made clear there are tens of thousands of votes still to be counted. Pennsylvania is where our democratic process was born. We must allow that process to play out. That is what Pennsylvania deserves. My team is working hard to make sure Pennsylvanians' voices are heard, but we’ll need the resources to make sure we can keep up this work. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | I have dedicated my life to making sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard, whether on the floor of the Senate or in a free and fair election. Now, let’s finish the job. With gratitude, Bob Casey The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Bob Casey
subject: The work is not finished
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Every Pennsylvanian deserves to have their voice heard.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2)
Peter,
We’re still in this race.
There are still thousands of votes left to be counted in Pennsylvania, and we need to make sure voters across the Commonwealth have their voices heard.
**Right now, when so much feels uncertain, one thing’s for sure: The fight goes on.[You can fund that fight and the work ahead with a donation of $5 or more right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?refcode=em20241110-2&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2)**
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?amount=15&refcode=em20241110-2-el&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?amount=25&refcode=em20241110-2-el&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?amount=50&refcode=em20241110-2-el&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?amount=100&refcode=em20241110-2-el&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?amount=250&refcode=em20241110-2-el&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?refcode=em20241110-2&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2)
---
My life’s work has focused on making sure the voices of Pennsylvanians are heard, and that doesn’t stop now. I’m here to tell you: The work is _not_ done, and this race is _not_ over.
**We're working to finish the job, and your donation helps us do just that:[Will you donate $5 or more right now to invest in the work ahead? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-2?refcode=em20241110-2&refcode2=4818_552475_P-Ewa2&akid=4818%2E552475%2EP-Ewa2)**
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Democrats refuse to accept the PA results and I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Pennsylvania law dictates an automatic recount if the margin is less than .5%. I’m currently leading by EXACTLY .5%, and we expect my opponent to try and force a recount.

name: Democracy on the Line
subject: This House race could be headed for a recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|
---
**The race for CA-27 is too close to call, while control of the U.S. House is still up for grabs.** Peter — we have an urgent update from a key California House race where the election is still too close to call.

Former NASA chief of staff George Whitesides, whose tossup race in CA-27 has yet to be called, is only down by a few thousand votes.

George could be headed for a recount, so we're mobilizing our supporters to ensure he has the resources to count every vote fairly and accurately.

[**The House is still up for grabs, and we need all hands on deck to keep our hopes of a House majority alive. Can you split $7 between Democracy on the Line and George Whitesides' recount fund today? Help make sure every vote in CA-27 gets counted.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96893090/511550465/-1002767123?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20241110_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwNjRjNjY2LTg5OWYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e972BIYeo3XsWt8YPiqDc3rOyQQ36qZ1PZ-c_ms6tmw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between George Whitesides - Recount Fund and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | ****[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96893096/511550471/-1002767123?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=DOTL_20241110_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwNjRjNjY2LTg5OWYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e972BIYeo3XsWt8YPiqDc3rOyQQ36qZ1PZ-c_ms6tmw=)****

clean_body: | The race for CA-27 is too close to call, while control of the U.S. House is still up for grabs. Peter — we have an urgent update from a key California House race where the election is still too close to call. Former NASA chief of staff George Whitesides, whose tossup race in CA-27 has yet to be called, is only down by a few thousand votes. George could be headed for a recount, so we're mobilizing our supporters to ensure he has the resources to count every vote fairly and accurately. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between George Whitesides - Recount Fund and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | **= = = We know the presidential and Senate outcomes were disappointing, but in California, thousands of ballots are still being counted and George's race could go either way. We need to make sure every vote gets counted — because everyone deserves to have their voices heard. Our House majority could come down to just a handful of votes in California. = Thanks for stepping up, Democracy on the Line = | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Our job has never been more important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, I first want to thank you for your support. It is an honor to be re-elected to serve New York’s 10th Congressional District. And with your help, we were able to help flip three New York Congressional seats from Republican to Democrat despite serious headwinds. Donald Trump won the election to be our 47th President, and every American must accept that result, even though it is not the outcome we worked so hard for. **I ran for Congress to uphold and protect our democracy and the rule of law, which depends on our adherence to the peaceful transfer of power. That sacrosanct principle applies equally when we lose.** I am proud to have worked hard in support of Vice President Harris and Governor Walz, who centered their patriotic campaign of optimism around our Party’s commitment to lift up every American, regardless of background, and ensure that the American Dream is accessible to all. There is no question that these are uncertain times, Peter. We now face the prospect of authoritarian leadership that threatens to strip Americans of their individual freedoms and fundamental rights, destabilize democracy around the globe, exact revenge and retribution against dissent, and compromise our right to vote in free and fair elections. America has chosen Donald Trump to lead this nation — but not to indulge his darkest instincts or undermine the foundations of our democracy and the rule of law. **Today and in the days ahead, our job has never been more important. Our resolve must remain unbroken.** I promise to continue my efforts to hold Donald Trump and his MAGA allies accountable as they try to drag us backward. Our principles and faith in our democracy will always be stronger than Donald Trump’s lies and division. We have no time to waste, Peter. We must get back to work right away to stay ahead of Trump and his authoritarian desires. Thank you for staying the course with me. Together in this fight for our democracy, Dan | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96893340/511551353/-1958928518?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_NOA_AC_20241110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTY1Y2E0NC04YTlmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3RRiFFOUgtWopuPNukHh9sEGgatpACiSyhHLN6GV7E=)

clean_body: Happy Birthday to the United States Marine Corps. | | | | | | MESSAGE FROM JD VANCE: HAPPY BIRTHDAY UNITED STATES MARINE CORPS! Friend, as a Marine veteran I want to say HAPPY BIRTHDAY to every Marine reading this message. President Trump & I love everyone who’s put on the uniform to defend our country. When President Trump is sworn in, he will rebuild our military and make sure our veterans are treated with the dignity that they deserve. We love our troops! We will Make America Great Again! Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0083b1b8278b4690ae33094da2cb97d2&_e=X0jzTaW-0PIs83DqojZQRyB8PHpsGPqtFiMtSdBPnXj9weSPB3yaTJ4UeLwNc3g_INKCNkVJ_1putBJzkMfx7kFs0PYL7_zY3e4M_UnpXTkR67d5F7hewzt8Zvz4WrR57twFwhGp6GIUBBrJ4908QDF2mEDgftkZZjMS8AIWU1d58mggdcWbjN2fSZVzEJ3eyImXJtWameQ7LNTJ_XFXUE6hwveQLMHb-O1HhS2eedHPX_IXf6pD3K8S5ngHkcNFKOMLhzd9oOW4h85JhPmT3Imv7jZPSPdb0iHO1EgDUVuL5pokIsTV1Uo8ofGnnc9Fs9nCkcMNwS_BwFPfd-9l0r8wfGNPM3WsYqD_Hdsh-cfGNaB304jes2URwno77iftiYwcgFysDBA1WU2k9PzOq_NJSVGPjda53E7YMe55yDkfczP3SAGySq1LZMuS1Q_yNSR6RI6lZqNRiWvto442G5nATnAMUut0NdCy-3HyiRWcH1uPI37AQkKlWmwbHyVk)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0083b1b8278b4690ae33094da2cb97d2&_e=X0jzTaW-0PIs83DqojZQRyB8PHpsGPqtFiMtSdBPnXj9weSPB3yaTJ4UeLwNc3g_INKCNkVJ_1putBJzkMfx7kFs0PYL7_zY3e4M_UnpXTkR67d5F7hewzt8Zvz4WrR57twFwhGp6GIUBBrJ4908QDF2mEDgftkZZjMS8AIWU1d58mggdcWbjN2fSZVzEJ3eyImXJtWameQ7LNTJ_XFXUE6hwveQLMHb-O1HhS2eedHPX_IXf6pD3K8S5ngHkcNFKOMLhzd9oOW4h85JhPmT3Imv7jZPSPdb0iHO1EgDUVuL5pokIsTV1Uo8ofGnnc9Fs9nCkcMNwS_BwFPfd-9l0jMDzA32vx-qHQEB0OXPBe0keNU2wqTdLizpxsUc7yvmCZ9eyqloNC6vdbQc6lG1dN2jjIiSXnlYMebG7S3cC-sJ3AbOoUhFaUwlhJU-2V2dBcVhsY34txS3TXjfxw6R500oEehHNj2Uoiem4Gt2KNRJgT7EY24XMlzf93ay5XnK)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

clean_body: update for you — | = | We know that political emails have a reputation for being hyperbolic or “over the top”. That’s why this election, we’ve emailed you with one primary message: That control of the U.S. House will come down to California and we need grassroots support to organize in the critical seats. Now, with votes still being counted, that message has been proven true beyond any doubt. Control of the U.S. House is still up for grabs. And every hope of a Democratic takeover of the chamber depends on us flipping the outstanding California tossup seats. = = = = = = We’ve been honest this whole election season, and we will be honest now: It is not a glide path to win back the U.S. House at this stage. A lot of things have to go right in these uncalled California races. But, we have a critical window where we can ensure that every vote is counted. Many ballots will need to be “cured” (have errors corrected) in order to be counted. We are keeping our operations fully running to help reach out to voters at risk for their votes not counting. = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. California Democratic Party 1830 9th St Sacramento, CA 95811 United States

First and foremost, we want to acknowledge the fear, confusion, and sadness many of you are feeling at this moment. For others, you may be looking for something meaningful and important to channel your emotions toward. If that's you, then we're asking you to make a donation to the Democratic Party today. **Here's why this request is so important.** As you read this, there are U.S. Senate and House races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. They all need our help to get across the finish line. [Can you please rush a contribution to the Harris Fight Fund program today? We will put your donation to work making sure we succeed and count every vote in these final races.](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbZgQXpVgobeZMEJj-yluoUFcsodG7z6HKm7KBaYk5blVv6hTxikGUBmzEZ6AJxcM2q5CQo7jl-N3HEgGy36Rhe4oejsvHl4i1a70w4dkfwpK-wfvVd6ng71BUiPYaRGg4RGEAvJlH5OSTG443VwRtizFdXjxOA7VPQZc-_ckB5244uVOnWH5SEHfO7-MS15YlLaukxvnSxIUbhU37gsd7rYl96DSaeGx7MX0MvHvnzq6R4-3qsXfArayYIXvPCf2nUu3Iqky2Zoimj2MO0PfU3LBzQaY0-0KrLJiIgELtkGuL8LVWsz0EI7sFekt9Le7C1nKrN-cezkZwhwrjfklYRLWlLy4ftm6nPY8ctDO1mkCKPzf1GmJPMh19UKbw8sR014KVw4ahuY9dkX4mMhuvYM6Gn7gwXdbz9y8KEmW3rIQM1-bkGeZg_4j5RgIiccLmw6nHPM3RQoW8TnAqJG705g/4bc/mHgBvxNvTle4uvlVrV3BBA/h1/h001.lOCTzbn9Ny1p3GOpvJtD1PeEV3f_1qwUeON735oqR9c) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbZgQXpVgobeZMEJj-yluoUFcsodG7z6HKm7KBaYk5blVv6hTxikGUBmzEZ6AJxcM2q5CQo7jl-N3HEgGy36Rhe4oejsvHl4i1a70w4dkfwpK-wfvVd6ng71BUiPYaRGg4RGEAvJlH5OSTG443VwRtizFdXjxOA7VPQZc-_ckB5244uVOnWH5SEHfO7-MS15YlLaukxvnSxIUbhU37gsd7rYl96DSaeGx7MX0MvHvnzq6n9WPiY-gkG-96HIE-HpiVUBK6xSu2uZbBgzMl4pWJIFD9exAdXeWPe9ms5W3hj5vK_3ff61yFbq6fASeTGEqqUZA9e_XaweFCG_h7XmYYmqG7x3tb9OyRQey231S3zBPT94B__zWA7F1Xq4D2qMaaLAPg8yOjOVL9dHcVVVGj-LAfogwbdrhBW8T0X7JbYcIE25JZv-xXbaXQxmxcEI4_78-p7x-MGnDG6-1DbuEr1DI0uckcak7l8CBbjcZTLBA/4bc/mHgBvxNvTle4uvlVrV3BBA/h2/h001.PtlZa2ba1BL5mZp3Ya9GhP80cdpeD-pP3G4hWWVjAsM)

name: Stand with Bernie on Gaza via Our Revolution
subject: Trump + Netanyahu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

As Trump celebrated, Israeli President Benjamin Netanyahu was rejoicing
right along with him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20447?t=1011&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ][IMG]

Netanyahu was one of the first to congratulate Trump, complimenting him on
“history’s greatest comeback”. Meanwhile, Netanyahu’s closest advisors
wasted no time saying that they believe Trump will let them get away with
anything they want.

Palestinians across Gaza are already paying the brutal price as Israeli
forces double down their massive offensive in northern Gaza, wiping out
one of the last remaining hospitals and killing scores of men, women, and
children.

We have to do something.

Bernie has introduced a resolution to halt $20 billion of U.S. weapons
sales to Israel and finally FORCE the Israeli government to stop the
slaughter. It will be the FIRST EVER vote in Congressional history to
directly block an arms sale to Israel and it’s just DAYS AWAY.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20448?source=email-111024&t=1012&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]We need to show a groundswell of public support to make it clear to
Congress that THIS is the moment to draw a line in the sand and show
Netanyahu we will not look the other way. Will you stand with Bernie and
show massive support for his resolution?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20448?source=email-111024&t=1013&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]ADD YOUR NAME

Netanyahu’s far-right national security minister minced no words in
responding to Trump’s reelection, saying “It’s time for total victory.”

Given the scale of the destruction and slaughter we’ve seen so far, it’s
almost hard to imagine it could get worse. But it can. And it will if we
don’t act.

Experts say Trump’s reelection has taken the pressure off Netanyahu to
reach any kind of ceasefire deal. Now he’ll just run out the clock on
Biden’s term, waiting for Trump to enter office and give him the
greenlight to do anything he likes.

We have just a few weeks left before Trump takes office to do SOMETHING –
and Bernie is leading the way with a path forward to stop the endless flow
of weapons. But he needs ALL of us to stand with him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20448?source=email-111024&t=1014&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]Right now, Bernie’s resolution is our best shot at putting an end to
our endless flow of weapons into Israel. Will you add your name to show
massive public support before it’s too late?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7215%2E5885482%2Ef1xLvA ]Website |

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Lineberger for US Congress – November 10th, 2024
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

Welcome to our first Post-Election Update!

Thank you, Thank you, Thank you!!! Your physical, emotional, intellectual
and financial support made this campaign possible. Each and every one of
you, whether you did a little or a lot, helped get us closer to our goal.
All of you are very much appreciated!

Sadly, we lost. I had often said that I needed 300,000 votes, and that was
close to right.

For US House Texas congressional District 26
Brandon Gill (Rep) got about 260,000
votes - about 1.75x my votes
Ernest R. Lineberger III (Dem) got about 137,000 votes
Phil Grey (Lib) got about
8,000 votes

These numbers are not exact. I believe that I got slightly better than 35%
of the vote.
The total votes cast in the district were just over 400,000.

We offered a Better Choice and Hope for a Better Future, But:
1. Enough voters didn’t know me or about me
2. People voted based on the economy, but not understanding how
it works or who could fix it
3. Republicans have better access to the ears of the people with
their multi-media going full time.

Overall, for Texas, we have the same two senators as we had before and the
same number of Dem Representatives in the US House (13 of 38 before, 13 of
38 after). I have not checked on the Texas House and Senate.

Nationally, the Republicans will be mostly in charge. They have the
Supreme Court, the Presidency, the Senate, and if not a majority in the US
House, very close to it. Democrats still have some members on the Supreme
Court, almost half of the US Senate (remember the filibuster), and about
half of the US House (it is still to be determined who will have the
majority). This will squarely place the responsibility for the economy and
other national policies on the shoulders of the Republicans. This should
help to push sentiment back towards the Democrats. We need to be ready
with better means of communication to help voters know the truth.

As for me. I’m disappointed. Being a first-time candidate, I was not
expected to win, but I had developed high hopes, especially with
endorsements and poll greeting encouragement. And if not for me, at least
for some of my Dem running mates. For now, I’m reducing overhead to
minimize expenses. Overall, we spent very close to $100K on our campaign
with almost one third of that coming out of my pocket. I’m going to
continue accepting donations to help recover some of those costs. No
decision has been made regarding running again in 2026, but recovering some
of this money will help put me in a better place to do so.
https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com

My intentions for the next 12 months are to be active in the community.
Yesterday, I participated and gave the keynote speech at Little Elm’s
Veteran’s Day March and Ceremony. Today, I met with a group of Dem’s
commiserating and considering future plans. Tuesday and Wednesday evening
will be gatherings of Carrollton Dem’s and Carrollton Pride groups. I want
to branch out to other types of groups, like charitable and civic
organizations, to better get to know and be known in the district. We’ll
see where it leads.

If you have ideas of good contact points with the community, please let me
know.

I am very grateful to all of you who provided support to me and my
campaign. So many people did so much, and under better circumstances it
might have been enough. I’ve learned a lot from you and the whole
process. I do not intend to let this experience go to waste. If anyone
wants to provide direct support as a member of my pre-campaign team, let me
know.

SIGNS: If you see any of my campaign signs out near the roadways, please
help remove them if safe to do so. The 2024 campaign is over and we don’t
want to get any fines for leaving signs out too long. Thanks!

Ernest Lineberger
clean_body: Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress! Welcome to our first Post-Election Update! Thank you, Thank you, Thank you!!! Your physical, emotional, intellectual and financial support made this campaign possible. Each and every one of you, whether you did a little or a lot, helped get us closer to our goal. All of you are very much appreciated! Sadly, we lost. I had often said that I needed 300,000 votes, and that was close to right. For US House Texas congressional District 26 Brandon Gill (Rep) got about 260,000 votes - about 1.75x my votes Ernest R. Lineberger III (Dem) got about 137,000 votes Phil Grey (Lib) got about 8,000 votes These numbers are not exact. I believe that I got slightly better than 35% of the vote. The total votes cast in the district were just over 400,000. We offered a Better Choice and Hope for a Better Future, But: 1. Enough voters didn’t know me or about me 2. People voted based on the economy, but not understanding how it works or who could fix it 3. Republicans have better access to the ears of the people with their multi-media going full time. Overall, for Texas, we have the same two senators as we had before and the same number of Dem Representatives in the US House (13 of 38 before, 13 of 38 after). I have not checked on the Texas House and Senate. Nationally, the Republicans will be mostly in charge. They have the Supreme Court, the Presidency, the Senate, and if not a majority in the US House, very close to it. Democrats still have some members on the Supreme Court, almost half of the US Senate (remember the filibuster), and about half of the US House (it is still to be determined who will have the majority). This will squarely place the responsibility for the economy and other national policies on the shoulders of the Republicans. This should help to push sentiment back towards the Democrats. We need to be ready with better means of communication to help voters know the truth. As for me. I’m disappointed. Being a first-time candidate, I was not expected to win, but I had developed high hopes, especially with endorsements and poll greeting encouragement. And if not for me, at least for some of my Dem running mates. For now, I’m reducing overhead to minimize expenses. Overall, we spent very close to $100K on our campaign with almost one third of that coming out of my pocket. I’m going to continue accepting donations to help recover some of those costs. No decision has been made regarding running again in 2026, but recovering some of this money will help put me in a better place to do so. My intentions for the next 12 months are to be active in the community. Yesterday, I participated and gave the keynote speech at Little Elm’s Veteran’s Day March and Ceremony. Today, I met with a group of Dem’s commiserating and considering future plans. Tuesday and Wednesday evening will be gatherings of Carrollton Dem’s and Carrollton Pride groups. I want to branch out to other types of groups, like charitable and civic organizations, to better get to know and be known in the district. We’ll see where it leads. If you have ideas of good contact points with the community, please let me know. I am very grateful to all of you who provided support to me and my campaign. So many people did so much, and under better circumstances it might have been enough. I’ve learned a lot from you and the whole process. I do not intend to let this experience go to waste. If anyone wants to provide direct support as a member of my pre-campaign team, let me know. SIGNS: If you see any of my campaign signs out near the roadways, please help remove them if safe to do so. The 2024 campaign is over and we don’t want to get any fines for leaving signs out too long. Thanks! Ernest Lineberger

My friend—
When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back.
It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together.
Here’s where we’re at in Arizona:
I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.
Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down.
Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it.

name: The Voter Protection Project
subject: Too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85005?t=6&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy) Folks,

**Right now, one of the most competitive House races in the country is still too close to call.**

Former California Assemblymember and Democratic nominee in California's 13th District, Adam Gray, and his extremist opponent remain locked in a dead-heat in a race that could determine the House Majority.

With Donald Trump in the White House and extreme Republicans controlling the Senate, a Democratic House Majority would be our last line of defense against the extremist agenda.

[**Flipping CA-13 and the House Majority blue has never been more important. Will you split a $10 donation between the Voter Protection Project and the Adam Gray for Congress recount fund today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85006?t=7&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy)

In 2022, this district came down to only 564 votes.

That’s right, just 564.

**We know this race is on track to be even closer this time around – and with the House Majority hanging in the balance, we can’t afford to fall short.**

[**Will you split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and Adam Gray’s recount fund to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and stay on our path to victory in the House?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85006?t=8&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Gray Recount Account and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85007?t=9&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85011?t=13&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy)
Thank you,

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy)

[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18011%2E878179%2E8Di7hy)

body:
Our journey proved the power of grassroots action. Now, as we navigate this new political landscape, let's reflect, regroup, and continue working toward a just, free, and compassionate America.

# [A Campaign of Integrity: Thank You, Reflections on 2024, and the Path Forward](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=151316029&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzE2MDI5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzEyNjU5MjcsImV4cCI6MTczMzg1NzkyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.N1LtjwVl7F6dMbXv1l2XgM-mJWaScEX84d5xddWwo88)
### Our journey proved the power of grassroots action. Now, as we navigate this new political landscape, let's reflect, regroup, and continue working toward a just, free, and compassionate America.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=151316029&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzE2MDI5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzEyNjU5MjcsImV4cCI6MTczMzg1NzkyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.N1LtjwVl7F6dMbXv1l2XgM-mJWaScEX84d5xddWwo88)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/a-campaign-of-integrity-thank-you?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7e31ba90-f91a-4452-b3be-b90db44e89ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Before I turn my attention to the presidential election, let me take a moment to _**thank you**_.
With your support, we ran a powerful grassroots campaign and took this candidacy from _**completely**_ unknown to gaining over **[80,000 votes](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9b2c4185-75d6-4f6c-9da2-821eb53b469a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (!!!) in just six short months. That is a remarkable achievement by anyone's measure - and to do it on a tiny fraction of the incumbent's budget, supported entirely by people like yourselves, is downright **legendary**.
I will not be taking office in DC in January - I'll be cuddling an infant son instead - but rest assured that I'll still be reading, thinking, and writing about what matters in American politics and how we can all work to help America live up to its ideals.
And, 2026 will be here before we know it. Onward.
"It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.l5st1pxTMKdLZPaYDLbLggtUkQkirhjDONi6FICQSEU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151316029)
Now then. Election 2024 is done, in most races, and as we all know, Donald Trump has won a landslide victory in the Electoral College, and he's won the popular vote as well. Let's unpack this a little bit.
To be clear - **Trump got millions** _**fewer**_**votes this election than he did last time.** Then how did he win? Well, **Harris got** _**more**_**millions fewer** votes this year, than Biden did four years ago.
**Overall, 27 million fewer people voted in 2024 compared to 2020**.
The votes for Green Party and other third-party candidates make up a tiny fraction of that difference - not enough to sway the election, although enough to make a strong point of principle and protest in areas like south Dearborn, Michigan.
Democrats should be using this defeat as an opportunity for serious reflection. Trump's many, serious flaws cost him millions of voters. But Harris lost more, and lost the election, with a reasonable expectation of severe consequences to come on many issues that matter to folks. Why? What happened?
[Get 10% off forever](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/11c0bcba-9ae4-4ef3-8501-afed705d6da1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_First - I urge folks to reject the idea that "half the country is racist." While there is a substantial portion of Americans who do hold deeply ingrained racist ideology - the best sociopolitical study I've seen puts that at about 15% - it's not a majority, and it's not a healthy or realistic way to be thinking about our fellow Americans._
Leaving aside the question of "why did people vote for Trump," let's look at the question of "why did people NOT vote for Harris?" because it's more revealing, and because - as many leading thinkers, commentators, and organizers have said for years - if the Democratic Party does not consciously align with its base and embrace solid progressive values that serve the American people, it will become an entity devoid of meaning or promise, and it will lose.
What are traditionally Democratic issues?
* Fair, humane, and welcoming **immigration** policies. NOT separating families at the border, for example. Respecting and welcoming folks who come here to contribute to the American experiment, our economy, and our shared future.
* Bold action on **climate change** ; investing today to avert catastrophe tomorrow and to lay critical groundwork for the benefit of future generations.
* Universal **healthcare** , accessible and available to all - through whatever mechanisms, our healthcare system is (largely) broken, expensive, soulless, and inadequate to meet the real needs of everyday people at scale.
* **Student debt relief** , an increase in the **minimum wage** , strong **unions** , and other economic policies designed to benefit the working class - which is the vast majority of Americans, who have seen their cost of living increase for decades, and 60% of whom are living paycheck to paycheck.
* **Human rights** , which begins with upholding Constitutional **freedoms of speech and assembly** at home (yes, including on college campuses!) and extends to upholding **human rights abroad** and reducing our involvement in wars and oppressive violence for private profit on the taxpayer's dime.
* **People-power** , meaning financial transparency and accountability; eg. politicians relying more on individual donor support than on big corporations. "Government Of, By, and For the People."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.l5st1pxTMKdLZPaYDLbLggtUkQkirhjDONi6FICQSEU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151316029)

Broadly speaking, people who possess:
\- empathy;
\- compassion;
\- a drive to welcome newcomers, share wealth, and cultivate equality; and
\- a desire to make the world a more peaceful and prosperous place for everyone
...are attracted to the Democratic Party.
Harris lost because she stopped appealing to these values.
She reversed course on the border. She walked back her position on climate change to appeal to fracking interests and a few Pennsylvania voters. She hardly mentioned healthcare, minimum wage increases, or (ha!) financial transparency. When it comes to human rights, she "wouldn't do a thing differently" than Biden, which means she'd continue funding the slaughter of Palestinian children with our taxpayer money at the same unchecked, unconscionable scale. She also openly committed to ensuring America has "the most lethal fighting force in the world" and criticized Trump for not going to _war with Iran_ , for heaven's sake.
She also refused to let a Palestinian-American, Democratic elected official speak at the DNC - even with tame, pre-approved remarks. She shut down pro-peace protestors calling for her attention on Gaza. She's been vice president in an administration that's presided over brutal police crackdowns on some of the most vibrant, peaceful, and hugely attended anti-war protests in history - and not only that, but she courted, secured, and then bragged about the endorsement of **Liz Cheney** \- whose father is universally despised, a killer of millions of people in the Middle East.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=151316029&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzE2MDI5LCJpYXQiOjE3MzEyNjU5MjcsImV4cCI6MTczMzg1NzkyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.N1LtjwVl7F6dMbXv1l2XgM-mJWaScEX84d5xddWwo88)
**What 's there to vote for?** The party of hypocrisy, genocide, war, betrayal of their base, and suppression of free speech - or the party of billionaires held under the thrall of a crude egotist with felony convictions for his crimes committed while in the office of President before?
If there wasn't a third option on my ballot, I would have been seriously considering writing someone in. Genocide must be a red line, or nothing is. We _**cannot**_ allow our elected leaders to get away with committing genocide with no consequences, for strategy, for enlightened self-interest, and for the intactness of our own souls. The world becomes a much more terrifying place when atrocities against other peoples' children are normalized, and we're told to ignore it because of the price of groceries.
This is why Kamala Harris lost. (*Not an exhaustive list, I'm sure.) Not because she's Black, not because she's female, not because "half the country is racist" \- but because she (and the DNC) ran on a warmongering corporate-centrist platform, vote-shamed principled voices they _needed_ to listen to, stopped appealing to younger voters, told voters the economic pain they're feeling was psychosomatic, and betrayed their own principles in a time of immense moral crisis, when clarity and courage are _**most**_ necessary.
As a consequence, we all have to live with the fact of a clear and compelling Trump victory, and all the consequences for all of our communities that will entail. For many of us, it's likely to be a challenging time.
To help us get through these times together, and even thrive, I encourage folks to do the following:
\- Find what nourishes you, and do plenty of that. Garden. Play with your kids. Make art. Protest. Cook. Organize. Join a book club. (Start a book club.) Whatever it is.
\- **Get involved in politics**. Seek office as PCO. Support a local campaign that matters to you. Lobby your own elected officials - make appointments and meet them in person, make phone calls; share your concerns.
\- Do something direct to care for someone who's more impacted than you are.
\- Reach out for meaningful support from someone you trust.
\- Keep speaking up about what matters.
\- Don't stop caring.
[Share "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/518fc95f-3f05-4997-851a-58cbfb891ad6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let me close with this quote, one of my old favorites:
> "To laugh often and much;
> to win the respect of intelligent people and the affection of children;
> to earn the appreciation of honest critics and endure the betrayal of false friends;
> to appreciate beauty, to find the best in others;
> to leave the world a little better, whether by a healthy child, a garden patch, or a redeemed social condition;
> to know even one life has breathed easier because you have lived.
>
> This is to have succeeded!"
>
> Ralph Waldo Emerson
Win or lose, it's on all of us to make the world a better place. Let's keep going.
In love, commitment, and solidarity,
Melissa Chaudhry

Our journey proved the power of grassroots action. Now, as we navigate this new political landscape, let's reflect, regroup, and continue working toward a just, free, and compassionate America. | | | Nov 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Before I turn my attention to the presidential election, let me take a moment to thank you. With your support, we ran a powerful grassroots campaign and took this candidacy from completely unknown to gaining over (!!!) in just six short months. That is a remarkable achievement by anyone's measure - and to do it on a tiny fraction of the incumbent's budget, supported entirely by people like yourselves, is downright legendary. I will not be taking office in DC in January - I'll be cuddling an infant son instead - but rest assured that I'll still be reading, thinking, and writing about what matters in American politics and how we can all work to help America live up to its ideals. And, 2026 will be here before we know it. Onward. "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Now then. Election 2024 is done, in most races, and as we all know, Donald Trump has won a landslide victory in the Electoral College, and he's won the popular vote as well. Let's unpack this a little bit. To be clear - Trump got millions fewervotes this election than he did last time. Then how did he win? Well, Harris got moremillions fewer votes this year, than Biden did four years ago. Overall, 27 million fewer people voted in 2024 compared to 2020. The votes for Green Party and other third-party candidates make up a tiny fraction of that difference - not enough to sway the election, although enough to make a strong point of principle and protest in areas like south Dearborn, Michigan. Democrats should be using this defeat as an opportunity for serious reflection. Trump's many, serious flaws cost him millions of voters. But Harris lost more, and lost the election, with a reasonable expectation of severe consequences to come on many issues that matter to folks. Why? What happened? First - I urge folks to reject the idea that "half the country is racist." While there is a substantial portion of Americans who do hold deeply ingrained racist ideology - the best sociopolitical study I've seen puts that at about 15% - it's not a majority, and it's not a healthy or realistic way to be thinking about our fellow Americans. Leaving aside the question of "why did people vote for Trump," let's look at the question of "why did people NOT vote for Harris?" because it's more revealing, and because - as many leading thinkers, commentators, and organizers have said for years - if the Democratic Party does not consciously align with its base and embrace solid progressive values that serve the American people, it will become an entity devoid of meaning or promise, and it will lose. What are traditionally Democratic issues? Fair, humane, and welcoming immigration policies. NOT separating families at the border, for example. Respecting and welcoming folks who come here to contribute to the American experiment, our economy, and our shared future. Bold action on climate change ; investing today to avert catastrophe tomorrow and to lay critical groundwork for the benefit of future generations. Universal healthcare , accessible and available to all - through whatever mechanisms, our healthcare system is (largely) broken, expensive, soulless, and inadequate to meet the real needs of everyday people at scale. Student debt relief , an increase in the minimum wage , strong unions , and other economic policies designed to benefit the working class - which is the vast majority of Americans, who have seen their cost of living increase for decades, and 60% of whom are living paycheck to paycheck. Human rights , which begins with upholding Constitutional freedoms of speech and assembly at home (yes, including on college campuses!) and extends to upholding human rights abroad and reducing our involvement in wars and oppressive violence for private profit on the taxpayer's dime. People-power , meaning financial transparency and accountability; eg. politicians relying more on individual donor support than on big corporations. "Government Of, By, and For the People." Broadly speaking, people who possess: \- empathy; \- compassion; \- a drive to welcome newcomers, share wealth, and cultivate equality; and \- a desire to make the world a more peaceful and prosperous place for everyone ...are attracted to the Democratic Party. Harris lost because she stopped appealing to these values. She reversed course on the border. She walked back her position on climate change to appeal to fracking interests and a few Pennsylvania voters. She hardly mentioned healthcare, minimum wage increases, or (ha!) financial transparency. When it comes to human rights, she "wouldn't do a thing differently" than Biden, which means she'd continue funding the slaughter of Palestinian children with our taxpayer money at the same unchecked, unconscionable scale. She also openly committed to ensuring America has "the most lethal fighting force in the world" and criticized Trump for not going to war with Iran , for heaven's sake. She also refused to let a Palestinian-American, Democratic elected official speak at the DNC - even with tame, pre-approved remarks. She shut down pro-peace protestors calling for her attention on Gaza. name: RECOUNT ALERT (via HMP)
subject: a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by HMP, # [#]
body:
Click here to unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4xBla9HqS06_watf7h3QaQ2?source=header_rfe]
We had to make a very difficult decision this morning.

The race for the House is deadlocked – a handful of races are undecided and many are headed toward very expensive recounts.

We spent EVERY cent we had on the election already – but these races could decide whether Trump has a dangerous Republican trifecta...

Or a Democratic safeguard to protect us from Trump’s extreme agenda.

So we’re asking you to step up and help us pay our bills so we can ensure EVERY vote is counted in this election. Please, recounts are expensive. And as of this morning, there are a handful of House races that are too close to call. So top donors just agreed to extend their 900% HOUSE MATCH for another 24 hours. So please, we hate to ask again in this moment, but will you rush in a 9X MATCHED $15? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-match-2024-post-ed?amount=15]

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Trump doesn’t deserve to have the slate wiped clean. Tell President Biden: Don’t pardon Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell President Biden: Do NOT Pardon Trump!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e049501-a6f4-4982-b37e-b85194db2b8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e69f358-defb-4d25-8582-8073391403e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Now that convicted felon Donald Trump has won the election, President Biden is [facing calls](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b0f3d4f-5eea-4e75-a452-e3136e17ed00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from Republicans and even some others to pardon him for his crimes related to January 6th and his mishandling of classified documents. As if that would help bring our country together. **[Absolutely NOT! Tell President Biden: DO NOT Pardon Trump!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T236a75ed-f6dd-46d9-8f38-fdd60a2fb2b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Trump doesn't deserve to have the slate wiped clean -- he put our democracy and national security at risk. We won't forget what he's done, even if he pardons himself or goes after the justice department. But he definitely doesn't get to come in on day one with a fresh start. [**Add your name to tell President Biden: Do NOT pardon Trump!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26e81254-4346-4c24-965b-257ee350e1ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32ce2568-717c-427b-80a7-52b8c136b9ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

|

subject: When Green Means Stop
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=337031ece738412c97f7e1cb3f792499&_e=I6L56kAAdKK_rj7wXhfCMKL7fFW7391h39zmfxxd8DMVw5nm5OlpUj_9hPY_qSBgybKaKDKt8PZz45IOhjbCJeKTQTOon9EetRzOXw-g64F7eQarDtWYkjD0zNiwvKL8uKlBXKlTridjIHbspQbH-aVud-ZOwxneufJhgY7LARdhwblXeLDXT1nOcxHQLledRLmN50MHEsDEDkn4fB1L87sQvFETHs3TXaos5Ck2mD5bGWFl9Zm_ONx_RLIjGMmS9Kg35jui-oj-yqJJ3K5HrWyJP4KS74dLm5PKFXTXH0Ik3yqOJrl4TPjj4Z5swn7Doyn8B23Si-ozV0FK6ndxW6MYGYogYH4Fa_gvWAWhj6863RjG4Kcq1FOEtBB0UDuUJUWcQ6nebZXV160chvkbiDd3_El8tGJn-v7G25iUdLozM9HJPdOsRv6XX0qfZ_co)
Peter,

Green policies are sweeping the globe, but their economic impact is becoming harder to ignore.

Around the world, people are waking up to the real costs of these policies.

In Europe, where energy is more expensive, voters are rejecting Green mandates. In America, JPMorgan Chase and State Street pulled all funds from Climate Action 100+, the world's largest investor initiative on climate change, while BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager, reduced its holdings and "scaled back its ties to the group."

Politicians have long been able to ignore their policies' trade-offs. But now, voters are feeling the pinch, and they don't like it.

Few understood this better than economist Henry Hazlitt, author of _Economics in One Lesson_ , who wrote time and again about the tendency of politicians to overlook the secondary consequences of their policies, which were responsible for _" nine-tenths of the economic fallacies that are working such dreadful harm in the world today."_

**We can 't let politicians ignore the realities of economics any longer, and we need your help spreading this message.**

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) is fighting to educate the next generation about these critical economic lessons. I am Lawrence Reed, President Emeritus of FEE. Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.

[Your gift allows us to continue providing students with the knowledge they need to understand these trade-offs and advocate for sound economic policies that will truly make a difference. Please donate today. >>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=337031ece738412c97f7e1cb3f792499&_e=I6L56kAAdKK_rj7wXhfCMKL7fFW7391h39zmfxxd8DMVw5nm5OlpUj_9hPY_qSBgybKaKDKt8PZz45IOhjbCJeKTQTOon9EetRzOXw-g64F7eQarDtWYkjD0zNiwvKL8uKlBXKlTridjIHbspQbH-aVud-ZOwxneufJhgY7LARdhwblXeLDXT1nOcxHQLledRLmN50MHEsDEDkn4fB1L87sQvFETHs3TXaos5Ck2mD5bGWFl9Zm_ONx_RLIjGMmS9Kg35jui-oj-yqJJ3K5HrYrdoLMBWQi1t1psbe2b3ZrEGjvoYrKV9p6FB_zqfiBeMF7RkAv0Tr_YghxDkpQw8S1KwSQH_ZuAxyOVQAvJPzH5feOxBY1L_DNxWiY7zN8XxCod5u19hDch8QB5-xt0XCtfcEkBseN-Sbs78uP8ZU__h86yMizxd1EDG2kfndBM)

# You're Invited - Nancy Mace
in Greenwood, SC Tomorrow Night!
---
| Please join us tomorrow night as Nancy speaks to the Greenwood Republican Party with some post-election insight and what's next for Congress. We have a lot to discuss about the America First agenda!

**START TIME** : 6:00PM
**END TIME** : 7:00PM
**LOCATION** : Greenwood County Courthouse at 528 Monument St # 114, Greenwood, SC 29646
**RSVP** : The event is Free and Open to the public. [RSVP Here](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=e504b2a386&e=ddc57b5ede) or on the button below.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: At this moment in America’s journey, I know hope can feel hard to come by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
As I assume the privilege of serving Delaware, the state I love, in Congress, I pledge my unwavering faith in our continued ability to turn our hope into historic progress.
#
At this moment in America’s journey, I know hope can feel hard to come by.
I know right now it’s hard to see the light at the end of the tunnel. It’s hard to believe that if we work for it, the progress we need will come. But we must never forget that we are the beneficiaries of seemingly impossible change becoming a reality.
That’s only true because previous generations persevered despite every reason to give up. But they didn’t: they summoned their hope, they found the light, and they changed the world.
As I assume the privilege of serving Delaware, the state I love, in Congress, I pledge my unwavering faith in our continued ability to turn our hope into historic progress — because it has always been in our country’s most significant challenges that we take our biggest steps forward.
Thak you,
Sarah McBride

subject: Our deadline today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act&amount=10]
Hi Peter,
I’m still neck-and-neck with my opponent in the race for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District.
Everything is on the line.
Today is the last day we can cure lawful ballots — so our team is working around the clock.
To make sure every lawful vote is counted fairly and securely, we need your help.
Can you chip in now to our Recount Fund to support our campaign as we work to determine a winner in this tossup race? Every bit of support makes a difference as we prepare for a potential recount. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act&amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act]
We are so grateful to have you on our team. We wouldn’t be here without you.
Thank you,
Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act]
Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you chip in to her Recount Fund now to make sure every vote is counted in this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024rc_email?refcode=X_111024_Wait_act]
https://twitter.com/EngelForArizona [https://twitter.com/EngelForArizona] https://www.instagram.com/engelforarizona/ [https://www.instagram.com/engelforarizona/] https://www.facebook.com/EngelForArizona/ [https://www.facebook.com/EngelForArizona/] https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]

I am fired up to help President Trump protect your life, liberty, and pursuit of happiness.
Thank you, God bless you, and God bless America!

Thank God Trump won. It feels like "morning in America!".
Trump gained 54 thousand new Republican voters in Virginia in 2024. We saw the same thing in the 5th Congrssional District where we gained 31 thousand more Republican voters than my predecessor had in 2020 alone. This is by far a new 5th Congressional Republican vote total record. Thank you President Trump for your endorsement and thank you to our amazing team of volunteers including Trump Force 47 volunteers for all the teamwork that helped us reach thousands of people all across the district!
I can't wait to get to work for you, We the People! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. It is an honor to be the Congressman-Elect for Virginia's 5th Congressional District.

clean_body: McGuire achives huge VA05 Vote Record | | | | == | == | Newsmax Wakeup America 11/10/24 I am fired up to help President Trump protect your life, liberty, and pursuit of happiness. Thank you, God bless you, and God bless America! Watch here: | == | Please share this video link: == Thank God Trump won. It feels like "morning in America!". Trump gained 54 thousand new Republican voters in Virginia in 2024. We saw the same thing in the 5th Congrssional District where we gained 31 thousand more Republican voters than my predecessor had in 2020 alone. This is by far a new 5th Congressional Republican vote total record. Thank you President Trump for your endorsement and thank you to our amazing team of volunteers including Trump Force 47 volunteers for all the teamwork that helped us reach thousands of people all across the district! I can't wait to get to work for you, We the People! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. It is an honor to be the Congressman-Elect for Virginia's 5th Congressional District. In Case You Missed It Links: John McGuire ABC 13 Lynchburg Interview 11/7/24 == John McGuire Newsmax Interview 11/7/24: == Donald J. name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c9a87ded22814d5bb6a814d7e2922f7d&_e=O72zG4BrERziPckRbWsarkk37wazizxEzjgCzBvA3OhoeWr2bbfbNAQTvjPv-07C3fa4NGr-z1IxXgOf-21PG6Wqhvd3e6BKDLOiDJBS33qda-pAcsecLeWveSKEhJVXUz8w-V5adx_2le0z-X6hKfnN8j3yiP0F6YmQSsWQVWRFJPoaeAGI5o6dhixAGISlAfQYF5ezXLYf3zaRNeI-DrW0msgenk4_d1WuYecev3XMjWCj2nDOm1E7yrw1a0wjXqMW4Bik-vejnfQUnBCI69VDvka47-hqf5izxWECG-6ACucUXgJiZTSHMqlWol-Y31EjVUlXtYDz7gLU6zMTOdvFVQwSX1tCxtwQ4Fw6VXa_5XY5kwGhgFYhmunz3FiiCU5XjzRIMwGqRlkZdNutGA%3D%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

#
# **Join Senator Hughes on Tuesday! **
* * *
Learn about your college options with Senator Hughes and several Pennsylvania colleges on Tuesday from 4PM to 7PM. Call [our office](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168891.173009.140&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12220) at 215.879.7777 if you have any questions! And help us spread the word! Share this email with family, friends, and neighbors who have college-bound students. Follow us on [Twitter](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168891.173009.140&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12221), [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168891.173009.140&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12222), [Instagram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168891.173009.140&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12223), and [TikTok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168891.173009.140&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12224) for more from Senator Hughes!

name: Dan Carr
subject: How Algorithms Hurt Conservatives
body:
President Elect Donald Trump is victorious, We'll examine how social media platforms have evolved and delve into how algorithms function behind the scenes to filter content.

| |
---|---|---
|
# How Algorithms Hurt Conservatives
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Nov 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
President Elect Donald Trump is victorious, We'll examine how social media platforms have evolved and delve into how algorithms function behind the scenes to filter content. These algorithms suppress certain viewpoints, particularly those of conservative voices.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0ee228f1-7843-4556-af3c-928fc1655cd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Join us as we investigate the mechanics of social media and how they impact modern political discourse, affecting what's seen, shared, and sometimes stifled in the online public square. FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: Alan Philp
November 10, 2024 (303) 332-6539 | aphilp@patriotpathways.com

|
---
# Statement from Gabe Evans Regarding CD 8 Victory
|
---
(THORNTON, CO) – Gabe Evans today issued the following statement following Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo’s concession: “I am incredibly humbled to be chosen as the next Congressman for Colorado’s 8th. It is an honor to be entrusted with the job of representing you and your families, and I am ready to fight back for a better direction for all Coloradans. "Thank you to my amazing wife and family for their incredible support and love over the past year, and thank you to our campaign's amazing staff and volunteers for their long hours and dedication to flipping this seat. Thank you also to Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo for your service and gracious concession. I look forward to working with her and her team to transition this office over the next few months. "Most importantly, I give thanks to God. My faith in Him has sustained me throughout this 15-month campaign. "I have spent my entire life running toward challenge, and now I am ready to take on my next challenge -- representing our communities in D.C. Thank you, Colorado. Let's do this!" Evans will hold a press conference at noon Monday, November 11th, at his campaign headquarters: 2200 E. 104th Avenue, Suite 209, Thornton.
\- 30 –

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: Alan Philp November 10, 2024 (303) 332-6539 | aphilp@patriotpathways.com | Statement from Gabe Evans Regarding CD 8 Victory | (THORNTON, CO) – Gabe Evans today issued the following statement following Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo’s concession: “I am incredibly humbled to be chosen as the next Congressman for Colorado’s 8th. It is an honor to be entrusted with the job of representing you and your families, and I am ready to fight back for a better direction for all Coloradans. "Thank you to my amazing wife and family for their incredible support and love over the past year, and thank you to our campaign's amazing staff and volunteers for their long hours and dedication to flipping this seat. Thank you also to Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo for your service and gracious concession. I look forward to working with her and her team to transition this office over the next few months. "Most importantly, I give thanks to God. My faith in Him has sustained me throughout this 15-month campaign. "I have spent my entire life running toward challenge, and now I am ready to take on my next challenge -- representing our communities in D.C. Thank you, Colorado. Let's do this!" Evans will hold a press conference at noon Monday, November 11th, at his campaign headquarters: 2200 E. 104th Avenue, Suite 209, Thornton. \- 30 – | | | | Elect Gabe Evans P.O. Box 350608, Westminster United States of America | | | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. |

name: Zoe
subject: We have to keep fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friends: As I am writing, we still have 10 House races uncalled here in California -- 3 incumbents and 7 possible flips from Red2Blue. Votes are still being counted and we are working to cure hundreds of ballots in each of these districts. House control is coming down to California. Right now, we're ahead in most of these races and we have a very real chance to win all 10. But we need help. It takes resources to fund our legal teams and ballot curing work. Can you help? Every bit goes a long way right now.

Here is the link if you can: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tbthzoe24]

We have to keep fighting. And we have to make sure every vote is counted in these races that will determine who controls the House by the narrowest of margins.

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]
Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

name: Team DLCC
subject: The fight isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Despite the setback our movement faced last week, our work must continue to build the country and future we want. We have upcoming special elections we're fighting to win – take a look: | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Despite the setback our movement faced last week, our work must continue to build the country and future we want.** State Democrats will be the last line of defense against a second Trump presidency, and as we await a final tally in some of our most competitive states and prepare for potential recounts, Democrats are already gearing up for special elections – take a look: | ****State** ** | ****District** **
---|---
Virginia
| SD-10
Virginia
| SD-32
Delaware
| SD-1
Delaware
| SD-5
**Every special election marks a chance to defend or expand Democratic power in state legislatures, and with Republicans taking power at the federal level, we need to seize every opportunity to fight back.**
[We’re counting on this grassroots team to step up and help continue our fight to elect state Democrats nationwide. Can we count on your support today?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqskafkX0PKr0_LE7jSFyDsCvcUZujFF0XT246RddJwUGrmBkwlmcUhke1JRnaaUa4yn46iqUQLJJmVMQZcGbb_FfS2xTUOTuf_mMY7SwLE8uVfHPU4Ilm0vXiDj8AshAyn1xwM9PkV18XFGlPZk8VC6ib8D-pxb72gY5i5s2TNPbHdGrsvXKDEU9vqYoeAJjTaiALKSklImyIaXJyNkEqR5Q4D7AEJ0_RkK9DV6fQLzCkqc4h2AjXgKpZ3aVEe03vjxyPEItsJSNXeunUfZlYA4GLKlBQHxqyirLb5aMpI8X0tDiiwd7gIqSDsjcSonHAgNF1jGGBmfc4ZpESJwZtLvXzaTwQS6JfkstOQsu6jdWajiM4eMLG5Vr5eLchT8aGjs_nmBwabvDEcLFc7a2zW1BAkIU6QNR2v1PKFWSNmS6-fZMW5VvpBSaMh3s58ztuzB1puEzLE_jkPdiPfuG9GqlzDlqF1UTqYOIF3PI7K7NVgo-26Amcw-baryD-2nIZk1FIbo4H8SWVw6xksqp-zK/4bc/99CS16TuRk2Op2DlI9euzQ/h0/h001.rXkWpK_IGr_LdPN9dgHHuYmlYAevWg3qLGGWyahWh2Y)

subject: PA is the new frontline

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4821%2E552475%2E8ELvpQ)
Peter, I’m going to be real with you: Bob Casey needs our help right now.
His race with Connecticut Dave is still too close to call 😬 and we need your help to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
Bob’s team is working hard while votes are still being counted, but they need the resources to make that happen.
Pennsylvania is now the frontline for standing up to Senate Republicans 🛑 and I need Bob in the Senate with me to keep up the fight. 💪
[**So please, donate $5 or whatever you can to Bob Casey today. Let’s make sure his team has the resources they need to get the job done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241110-5?refcode=em20241110-5&refcode2=4821_552475_8ELvpQ&akid=4821%2E552475%2E8ELvpQ)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: This isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter —
Votes are still being counted in Arizona. Several hundred thousand remain. Honestly, anything could happen here, and we need to be sure we have the resources we'll need to be prepared for any outcome.
We have to be completely sure we've done everything we possibly can to win. We have to continue pushing until this race is officially called. Until we have an indisputable win in Arizona, and not a second sooner. This is simply too important to leave to chance.
[**Please. I'm humbly asking you for a donation as we work to finish strong. $5 would be incredible, but the donation itself is what's important here. body:

# Sharon Reaches Record Votes for NM Congressional District 3
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
# Sharon Achieves 44% of the Vote.
---
| Sharon Clahchischilliage moves CD3 to 44% (the first presidential election since redistricting).
What is remarkable is that Sharon did this with a grassroots campaign that raised $75,000 ($1.68/vote estimate).
---
|
# How Can You Help?
---
| Sharon Clahchischilliage and her family sacrificed a lot of her own time and finances for the state and country she loves.
She now needs your help to make sure she her vendors and finances are stable. Please help New Mexico CD3 take the next steps to 2026 and support present and future candidates.

* Former NM StateHouse Representative.
* Present NM Public Education Commissioner - District 5
* Lifetime of New Mexico resident.
* Member of Navajo Nation.
